moves.name: Accelerock
moves.desc: Usually goes first.
moves.longDesc: No additional effect.

moves.name: Acid Armor
moves.desc: Raises the user's Defense by 2.
moves.longDesc: Raises the user's Defense by 2 stages.

moves.name: Acid Spray
moves.desc: 100% chance to lower the target's Sp. Def by 2.
moves.longDesc: Has a 100% chance to lower the target's Special Defense by 2 stages.

moves.name: Acrobatics
moves.desc: Power doubles if the user has no held item.
moves.longDesc: Power doubles if the user has no held item.

moves.name: Acupressure
moves.desc: Raises a random stat of the user or an ally by 2.
moves.longDesc: Raises a random stat by 2 stages as long as the stat is not already at stage 6. The user can choose to use this move on itself or an adjacent ally. Fails if no stat stage can be raised or if used on an ally with a substitute.

moves.name: Aerial Ace
moves.desc: This move does not check accuracy.
moves.longDesc: This move does not check accuracy.

moves.name: After You
moves.desc: The target makes its move right after the user.
moves.longDesc: The target makes its move immediately after the user this turn, no matter the priority of its selected move. Fails if the target would have moved next anyway, or if the target already moved this turn.

moves.name: Agility
moves.desc: Raises the user's Speed by 2.
moves.longDesc: Raises the user's Speed by 2 stages.

moves.name: Air Cutter
moves.desc: High critical hit ratio. Hits adjacent foes.
moves.longDesc: Has a higher chance for a critical hit.

moves.name: Air Slash
moves.desc: 30% chance to make the target flinch.
moves.longDesc: Has a 30% chance to make the target flinch.

moves.name: Alluring Voice
moves.desc: 100% confuse target that had a stat rise this turn.
moves.longDesc: Has a 100% chance to confuse the target if it had a stat stage raised this turn.

moves.name: Ally Switch
moves.desc: User and ally swap positions; using again can fail.
moves.longDesc: The user swaps positions with its ally. Fails if the user is the only Pokemon on its side. This move has a 1/X chance of being successful, where X starts at 1 and triples each time this move is successfully used. X resets to 1 if this move fails or if the user's last move used is not Ally Switch.

moves.name: Amnesia
moves.desc: Raises the user's Sp. Def by 2.
moves.longDesc: Raises the user's Special Defense by 2 stages.

moves.name: Ancient Power
moves.desc: 10% chance to raise all stats by 1 (not acc/eva).
moves.longDesc: Has a 10% chance to raise the user's Attack, Defense, Special Attack, Special Defense, and Speed by 1 stage.

moves.name: Apple Acid
moves.desc: 100% chance to lower the target's Sp. Def by 1.
moves.longDesc: Has a 100% chance to lower the target's Special Defense by 1 stage.

moves.name: Aqua Cutter
moves.desc: High critical hit ratio.
moves.longDesc: Has a higher chance for a critical hit.

moves.name: Aqua Jet
moves.desc: Usually goes first.
moves.longDesc: No additional effect.

moves.name: Aqua Ring
moves.desc: User recovers 1/16 max HP per turn.
moves.longDesc: The user has 1/16 of its maximum HP, rounded down, restored at the end of each turn while it remains active. If Big Root is held by the user, the HP recovered is 1.3x normal, rounded half down. If the user uses Baton Pass, the replacement will receive the healing effect.

moves.name: Aqua Step
moves.desc: 100% chance to raise the user's Speed by 1.
moves.longDesc: Has a 100% chance to raise the user's Speed by 1 stage.

moves.name: Aqua Tail
moves.desc: No additional effect.
moves.longDesc: No additional effect.

moves.name: Armor Cannon
moves.desc: Lowers the user's Defense and Sp. Def by 1.
moves.longDesc: Lowers the user's Defense and Special Defense by 1 stage.

moves.name: Aromatic Mist
moves.desc: Raises an ally's Sp. Def by 1.
moves.longDesc: Raises the target's Special Defense by 1 stage. Fails if there is no ally adjacent to the user.

moves.name: Assurance
moves.desc: Power doubles if target was damaged this turn.
moves.longDesc: Power doubles if the target has already taken damage this turn, other than direct damage from Belly Drum, confusion, Curse, or Pain Split.

moves.name: Attract
moves.desc: A target of the opposite gender gets infatuated.
moves.longDesc: Causes the target to become infatuated, making it unable to attack 50% of the time. Fails if both the user and the target are the same gender, if either is genderless, or if the target is already infatuated. The effect ends when either the user or the target is no longer active. Pokemon with the Oblivious Ability or protected by the Aroma Veil Ability are immune.

moves.name: Aura Sphere
moves.desc: This move does not check accuracy.
moves.longDesc: This move does not check accuracy.

moves.name: Aura Wheel
moves.desc: Morpeko: Electric; Hangry: Dark; 100% +1 Spe.
moves.longDesc: Has a 100% chance to raise the user's Speed by 1 stage. If the user is a Morpeko in Full Belly Mode, this move is Electric type. If the user is a Morpeko in Hangry Mode, this move is Dark type. This move cannot be used successfully unless the user's current form, while considering Transform, is Full Belly or Hangry Mode Morpeko.

moves.name: Aurora Veil
moves.desc: For 5 turns, damage to allies halved. Snow only.
moves.longDesc: For 5 turns, the user and its party members take 0.5x damage from physical and special attacks, or 0.66x damage if in a Double Battle; does not reduce damage further with Reflect or Light Screen. Critical hits ignore this protection. It is removed from the user's side if the user or an ally is successfully hit by Brick Break, Psychic Fangs, or Defog. Brick Break and Psychic Fangs remove the effect before damage is calculated. Lasts for 8 turns if the user is holding Light Clay. Fails unless the weather is Snow.

moves.name: Avalanche
moves.desc: Power doubles if user is damaged by the target.
moves.longDesc: Power doubles if the user was hit by the target this turn.

moves.name: Axe Kick
moves.desc: 30% confusion. User loses 50% max HP if miss.
moves.longDesc: Has a 30% chance to confuse the target. If this attack is not successful, the user loses half of its maximum HP, rounded down, as crash damage. Pokemon with the Magic Guard Ability are unaffected by crash damage.

moves.name: Baby-Doll Eyes
moves.desc: Lowers the target's Attack by 1.
moves.longDesc: Lowers the target's Attack by 1 stage.

moves.name: Baneful Bunker
moves.desc: Protects from moves. Contact: poison.
moves.longDesc: The user is protected from most attacks made by other Pokemon during this turn, and Pokemon making contact with the user become poisoned. This move has a 1/X chance of being successful, where X starts at 1 and triples each time this move is successfully used. X resets to 1 if this move fails, if the user's last move used is not Baneful Bunker, Burning Bulwark, Detect, Endure, King's Shield, Max Guard, Obstruct, Protect, Quick Guard, Silk Trap, Spiky Shield, or Wide Guard, or if it was one of those moves and the user's protection was broken. Fails if the user moves last this turn.

moves.name: Barb Barrage
moves.desc: 50% psn. 2x power if target already poisoned.
moves.longDesc: Has a 50% chance to poison the target. Power doubles if the target is already poisoned.

moves.name: Baton Pass
moves.desc: User switches, passing stat changes and more.
moves.longDesc: The user is replaced with another Pokemon in its party. The selected Pokemon has the user's stat stage changes transferred to it, as well as the effects of confusion, Aqua Ring, Curse, Dragon Cheer, Embargo, Focus Energy, Gastro Acid, Heal Block, Ingrain, Leech Seed, Lock-On (Mind Reader), Magnet Rise, Perish Song, Power Trick, Telekinesis, and a substitute with its remaining HP. The effect of Gastro Acid is not transferred if the recipient has an Ability that cannot be affected.

moves.name: Beak Blast
moves.desc: Burns on contact with the user before it moves.
moves.longDesc: If the user is hit by a contact move this turn before it can execute this move, the attacker is burned.

moves.name: Beat Up
moves.desc: All healthy allies aid in damaging the target.
moves.longDesc: Hits one time for the user and one time for each unfainted Pokemon without a non-volatile status condition in the user's party. The power of each hit is equal to 5+(X/10), where X is each participating Pokemon's base Attack; each hit is considered to come from the user.

moves.name: Belch
moves.desc: Cannot be selected until the user eats a Berry.
moves.longDesc: This move cannot be selected until the user eats a Berry, either by eating one that was held, stealing and eating one off another Pokemon with Bug Bite or Pluck, or eating one that was thrown at it with Fling. Once the condition is met, this move can be selected and used for the rest of the battle even if the user gains or uses another item or switches out. Consuming a Berry with Natural Gift does not count for the purposes of eating one.

moves.name: Belly Drum
moves.desc: User loses 50% max HP. Maximizes Attack.
moves.longDesc: Raises the user's Attack by 12 stages in exchange for the user losing 1/2 of its maximum HP, rounded down. Fails if the user would faint or if its Attack stat stage is 6.

moves.name: Bind
moves.desc: Traps and damages the target for 4-5 turns.
moves.longDesc: Prevents the target from switching for four or five turns (seven turns if the user is holding Grip Claw). Causes damage to the target equal to 1/8 of its maximum HP (1/6 if the user is holding Binding Band), rounded down, at the end of each turn during effect. The target can still switch out if it is holding Shed Shell or uses Baton Pass, Flip Turn, Parting Shot, Shed Tail, Teleport, U-turn, or Volt Switch. The effect ends if either the user or the target leaves the field, or if the target uses Mortal Spin, Rapid Spin, or Substitute successfully. This effect is not stackable or reset by using this or another binding move.

moves.name: Bite
moves.desc: 30% chance to make the target flinch.
moves.longDesc: Has a 30% chance to make the target flinch.

moves.name: Bitter Blade
moves.desc: User recovers 50% of the damage dealt.
moves.longDesc: The user recovers 1/2 the HP lost by the target, rounded half up. If Big Root is held by the user, the HP recovered is 1.3x normal, rounded half down.

moves.name: Bitter Malice
moves.desc: 100% chance to lower the target's Attack by 1.
moves.longDesc: Has a 100% chance to lower the target's Attack by 1 stage.

moves.name: Blast Burn
moves.desc: User cannot move next turn.
moves.longDesc: If this move is successful, the user must recharge on the following turn and cannot select a move.

moves.name: Blaze Kick
moves.desc: High critical hit ratio. 10% chance to burn.
moves.longDesc: Has a 10% chance to burn the target and a higher chance for a critical hit.

moves.name: Blizzard
moves.desc: 10% chance to freeze foe(s). Can't miss in Snow.
moves.longDesc: Has a 10% chance to freeze the target. If the weather is Snow, this move does not check accuracy.

moves.name: Block
moves.desc: Prevents the target from switching out.
moves.longDesc: Prevents the target from switching out. The target can still switch out if it is holding Shed Shell or uses Baton Pass, Flip Turn, Parting Shot, Teleport, U-turn, or Volt Switch. The effect ends if either the user or the target leaves the field.

moves.name: Body Press
moves.desc: Uses user's Def stat as Atk in damage calculation.
moves.longDesc: Damage is calculated using the user's Defense stat as its Attack, including stat stage changes. Other effects that modify the Attack stat are used as normal.

moves.name: Body Slam
moves.desc: 30% chance to paralyze the target.
moves.longDesc: Has a 30% chance to paralyze the target. Damage doubles and no accuracy check is done if the target has used Minimize while active.

moves.name: Bone Rush
moves.desc: Hits 2-5 times in one turn.
moves.longDesc: Hits two to five times. Has a 35% chance to hit two or three times and a 15% chance to hit four or five times. If one of the hits breaks the target's substitute, it will take damage for the remaining hits. If the user has the Skill Link Ability, this move will always hit five times. If the user is holding Loaded Dice, this move will hit 4-5 times.

moves.name: Boomburst
moves.desc: No additional effect. Hits adjacent Pokemon.
moves.longDesc: No additional effect.

moves.name: Bounce
moves.desc: Bounces turn 1. Hits turn 2. 30% paralyze.
moves.longDesc: Has a 30% chance to paralyze the target. This attack charges on the first turn and executes on the second. On the first turn, the user avoids all attacks other than Gust, Hurricane, Sky Uppercut, Smack Down, Thousand Arrows, Thunder, and Twister, and Gust and Twister have doubled power when used against it. If the user is holding a Power Herb, the move completes in one turn.

moves.name: Brave Bird
moves.desc: Has 33% recoil.
moves.longDesc: If the target lost HP, the user takes recoil damage equal to 33% the HP lost by the target, rounded half up, but not less than 1 HP.

moves.name: Breaking Swipe
moves.desc: 100% chance to lower the foe(s) Attack by 1.
moves.longDesc: Has a 100% chance to lower the target's Attack by 1 stage.

moves.name: Brick Break
moves.desc: Destroys screens, unless the target is immune.
moves.longDesc: If this attack does not miss, the effects of Reflect, Light Screen, and Aurora Veil end for the target's side of the field before damage is calculated.

moves.name: Brutal Swing
moves.desc: No additional effect. Hits adjacent Pokemon.
moves.longDesc: No additional effect.

moves.name: Bug Bite
moves.desc: User steals and eats the target's Berry.
moves.longDesc: If this move is successful and the user has not fainted, it steals the target's held Berry if it is holding one and eats it immediately, gaining its effects even if the user's item is being ignored. Items lost to this move cannot be regained with Recycle or the Harvest Ability.

moves.name: Bug Buzz
moves.desc: 10% chance to lower the target's Sp. Def by 1.
moves.longDesc: Has a 10% chance to lower the target's Special Defense by 1 stage.

moves.name: Bulk Up
moves.desc: Raises the user's Attack and Defense by 1.
moves.longDesc: Raises the user's Attack and Defense by 1 stage.

moves.name: Bulldoze
moves.desc: 100% chance lower adjacent Pkmn Speed by 1.
moves.longDesc: Has a 100% chance to lower the target's Speed by 1 stage.

moves.name: Bullet Punch
moves.desc: Usually goes first.
moves.longDesc: No additional effect.

moves.name: Bullet Seed
moves.desc: Hits 2-5 times in one turn.
moves.longDesc: Hits two to five times. Has a 35% chance to hit two or three times and a 15% chance to hit four or five times. If one of the hits breaks the target's substitute, it will take damage for the remaining hits. If the user has the Skill Link Ability, this move will always hit five times. If the user is holding Loaded Dice, this move will hit 4-5 times.

moves.name: Burn Up
moves.desc: User's Fire type becomes typeless; must be Fire.
moves.longDesc: Fails unless the user is a Fire type. If this move is successful and the user is not Terastallized, the user's Fire type becomes typeless as long as it remains active.

moves.name: Burning Jealousy
moves.desc: 100% burns a target that had a stat rise this turn.
moves.longDesc: Has a 100% chance to burn the target if it had a stat stage raised this turn.

moves.name: Calm Mind
moves.desc: Raises the user's Sp. Atk and Sp. Def by 1.
moves.longDesc: Raises the user's Special Attack and Special Defense by 1 stage.

moves.name: Ceaseless Edge
moves.desc: Sets a layer of Spikes on the opposing side.
moves.longDesc: If this move is successful, it sets up a hazard on the opposing side of the field, damaging each opposing Pokemon that switches in, unless it is a Flying-type Pokemon or has the Levitate Ability. A maximum of three layers may be set, and opponents lose 1/8 of their maximum HP with one layer, 1/6 of their maximum HP with two layers, and 1/4 of their maximum HP with three layers, all rounded down. Can be removed from the opposing side if any Pokemon uses Tidy Up, or if any opposing Pokemon uses Mortal Spin, Rapid Spin, or Defog successfully, or is hit by Defog.

moves.name: Charge
moves.desc: +1 SpD, user's next Electric move 2x power.
moves.longDesc: Raises the user's Special Defense by 1 stage. The user's next Electric-type attack will have its power doubled; the effect ends when the user is no longer active, or after the user attempts to use any Electric-type move besides Charge, even if it is not successful.

moves.name: Charge Beam
moves.desc: 70% chance to raise the user's Sp. Atk by 1.
moves.longDesc: Has a 70% chance to raise the user's Special Attack by 1 stage.

moves.name: Charm
moves.desc: Lowers the target's Attack by 2.
moves.longDesc: Lowers the target's Attack by 2 stages.

moves.name: Chilling Water
moves.desc: 100% chance to lower the target's Attack by 1.
moves.longDesc: Has a 100% chance to lower the target's Attack by 1 stage.

moves.name: Chilly Reception
moves.desc: Starts Snow. User switches out.
moves.longDesc: For 5 turns, the weather becomes Snow. The user switches out even if it is trapped and is replaced immediately by a selected party member. The user does not switch out if there are no unfainted party members.

moves.name: Circle Throw
moves.desc: Forces the target to switch to a random ally.
moves.longDesc: If both the user and the target have not fainted, the target is forced to switch out and be replaced with a random unfainted ally. This effect fails if the target is under the effect of Ingrain, has the Suction Cups Ability, or this move hit a substitute.

moves.name: Clanging Scales
moves.desc: Lowers the user's Defense by 1.
moves.longDesc: Lowers the user's Defense by 1 stage.

moves.name: Clangorous Soul
moves.desc: User loses 33% of its max HP. +1 to all stats.
moves.longDesc: Raises the user's Attack, Defense, Special Attack, Special Defense, and Speed by 1 stage in exchange for the user losing 33% of its maximum HP, rounded down. Fails if the user would faint or if its Attack, Defense, Special Attack, Special Defense, and Speed stat stages would not change.

moves.name: Clear Smog
moves.desc: Resets all of the target's stat stages to 0.
moves.longDesc: Resets all of the target's stat stages to 0.

moves.name: Close Combat
moves.desc: Lowers the user's Defense and Sp. Def by 1.
moves.longDesc: Lowers the user's Defense and Special Defense by 1 stage.

moves.name: Coaching
moves.desc: Raises an ally's Attack and Defense by 1.
moves.longDesc: Raises the target's Attack and Defense by 1 stage. Fails if there is no ally adjacent to the user.

moves.name: Coil
moves.desc: Raises user's Attack, Defense, accuracy by 1.
moves.longDesc: Raises the user's Attack, Defense, and accuracy by 1 stage.

moves.name: Comeuppance
moves.desc: If hit by an attack, returns 1.5x damage.
moves.longDesc: Deals damage to the last opposing Pokemon to hit the user with a physical or special attack this turn equal to 1.5 times the HP lost by the user from that attack, rounded down. If the user did not lose HP from that attack, this move deals 1 HP of damage instead. If that opposing Pokemon's position is no longer in use and there is another opposing Pokemon on the field, the damage is done to it instead. Only the last hit of a multi-hit attack is counted. Fails if the user was not hit by an opposing Pokemon's physical or special attack this turn.

moves.name: Confuse Ray
moves.desc: Confuses the target.
moves.longDesc: Causes the target to become confused.

moves.name: Copycat
moves.desc: Uses the last move used in the battle.
moves.longDesc: The user uses the last move used by any Pokemon, including itself. Fails if no move has been used, or if the last move used was Assist, Baneful Bunker, Beak Blast, Behemoth Bash, Behemoth Blade, Belch, Bestow, Blazing Torque, Celebrate, Chatter, Circle Throw, Combat Torque, Copycat, Counter, Covet, Destiny Bond, Detect, Dragon Tail, Dynamax Cannon, Endure, Feint, Focus Punch, Follow Me, Helping Hand, Hold Hands, King's Shield, Magical Torque, Mat Block, Me First, Metronome, Mimic, Mirror Move, Nature Power, Noxious Torque, Protect, Rage Powder, Roar, Shell Trap, Sketch, Sleep Talk, Snatch, Spiky Shield, Spotlight, Struggle, Switcheroo, Tera Starstorm, Thief, Transform, Trick, Whirlwind, or Wicked Torque.

moves.name: Corrosive Gas
moves.desc: Removes adjacent Pokemon's held items.
moves.longDesc: The target loses its held item. This move cannot cause Pokemon with the Sticky Hold Ability to lose their held item or cause a Kyogre, Groudon, Dialga, Palkia, Giratina, Arceus, Genesect, Silvally, Zacian, Zamazenta, Paradox Pokemon, or Ogerpon to lose their Blue Orb, Red Orb, Adamant Crystal, Lustrous Globe, Griseous Core, Plate, Drive, Memory, Rusted Sword, Rusted Shield, Booster Energy, or Mask, respectively. In this case, Paradox Pokemon include every species with the Protosynthesis and Quark Drive Abilities, except Gouging Fire, Raging Bolt, Iron Boulder, and Iron Crown. Items lost to this move cannot be regained with Recycle or the Harvest Ability.

moves.name: Cosmic Power
moves.desc: Raises the user's Defense and Sp. Def by 1.
moves.longDesc: Raises the user's Defense and Special Defense by 1 stage.

moves.name: Cotton Guard
moves.desc: Raises the user's Defense by 3.
moves.longDesc: Raises the user's Defense by 3 stages.

moves.name: Cotton Spore
moves.desc: Lowers the target's Speed by 2.
moves.longDesc: Lowers the target's Speed by 2 stages.

moves.name: Counter
moves.desc: If hit by physical attack, returns double damage.
moves.longDesc: Deals damage to the last opposing Pokemon to hit the user with a physical attack this turn equal to twice the HP lost by the user from that attack. If the user did not lose HP from the attack, this move deals 1 HP of damage instead. If that opposing Pokemon's position is no longer in use and there is another opposing Pokemon on the field, the damage is done to it instead. Only the last hit of a multi-hit attack is counted. Fails if the user was not hit by an opposing Pokemon's physical attack this turn.

moves.name: Covet
moves.desc: If the user has no item, it steals the target's.
moves.longDesc: If this attack was successful and the user has not fainted, it steals the target's held item if the user is not holding one. A target with the Sticky Hold Ability does not lose its held item if it has not fainted. The target's item is not stolen if it is a Blue Orb, Red Orb, Adamant Crystal, Lustrous Globe, Griseous Core, Plate, Drive, Memory, Rusted Sword, Rusted Shield, Booster Energy, or Mask held by a Kyogre, Groudon, Dialga, Palkia, Giratina, Arceus, Genesect, Silvally, Zacian, Zamazenta, Paradox Pokemon, or Ogerpon, respectively, or if the user is one of those species and the target is holding the respective item. In this case, Paradox Pokemon include every species with the Protosynthesis and Quark Drive Abilities, except Gouging Fire, Raging Bolt, Iron Boulder, and Iron Crown. Items lost to this move cannot be regained with Recycle or the Harvest Ability.

moves.name: Crabhammer
moves.desc: High critical hit ratio.
moves.longDesc: Has a higher chance for a critical hit.

moves.name: Cross Chop
moves.desc: High critical hit ratio.
moves.longDesc: Has a higher chance for a critical hit.

moves.name: Cross Poison
moves.desc: High critical hit ratio. 10% chance to poison.
moves.longDesc: Has a 10% chance to poison the target and a higher chance for a critical hit.

moves.name: Crunch
moves.desc: 20% chance to lower the target's Defense by 1.
moves.longDesc: Has a 20% chance to lower the target's Defense by 1 stage.

moves.name: Crush Claw
moves.desc: 50% chance to lower the target's Defense by 1.
moves.longDesc: Has a 50% chance to lower the target's Defense by 1 stage.

moves.name: Curse
moves.desc: Curses if Ghost, else -1 Spe, +1 Atk, +1 Def.
moves.longDesc: If the user is not a Ghost type, lowers the user's Speed by 1 stage and raises the user's Attack and Defense by 1 stage. If the user is a Ghost type, the user loses 1/2 of its maximum HP, rounded down and even if it would cause fainting, in exchange for the target losing 1/4 of its maximum HP, rounded down, at the end of each turn while it is active. If the target uses Baton Pass, the replacement will continue to be affected. Fails if there is no target or if the target is already affected.

moves.name: Dark Pulse
moves.desc: 20% chance to make the target flinch.
moves.longDesc: Has a 20% chance to make the target flinch.

moves.name: Darkest Lariat
moves.desc: Ignores the target's stat stage changes.
moves.longDesc: Ignores the target's stat stage changes, including evasiveness.

moves.name: Dazzling Gleam
moves.desc: No additional effect. Hits adjacent foes.
moves.longDesc: No additional effect.

moves.name: Decorate
moves.desc: Raises the target's Attack and Sp. Atk by 2.
moves.longDesc: Raises the target's Attack and Special Attack by 2 stages.

moves.name: Defog
moves.desc: -1 evasion; ends user and target hazards/terrain.
moves.longDesc: Lowers the target's evasiveness by 1 stage. If this move is successful and whether or not the target's evasiveness was affected, the effects of Reflect, Light Screen, Aurora Veil, Safeguard, Mist, Spikes, Toxic Spikes, Stealth Rock, and Sticky Web end for the target's side, and the effects of Spikes, Toxic Spikes, Stealth Rock, and Sticky Web end for the user's side. Ignores a target's substitute, although a substitute will still block the lowering of evasiveness. If there is a terrain active and this move is successful, the terrain will be cleared.

moves.name: Destiny Bond
moves.desc: If an opponent knocks out the user, it also faints.
moves.longDesc: Until the user's next move, if an opposing Pokemon's attack knocks the user out, that Pokemon faints as well, unless the attack was Doom Desire or Future Sight. Fails if the user used this move successfully as its last move, disregarding moves used through the Dancer Ability.

moves.name: Detect
moves.desc: Prevents moves from affecting the user this turn.
moves.longDesc: The user is protected from most attacks made by other Pokemon during this turn. This move has a 1/X chance of being successful, where X starts at 1 and triples each time this move is successfully used. X resets to 1 if this move fails, if the user's last move used is not Baneful Bunker, Burning Bulwark, Detect, Endure, King's Shield, Max Guard, Obstruct, Protect, Quick Guard, Silk Trap, Spiky Shield, or Wide Guard, or if it was one of those moves and the user's protection was broken. Fails if the user moves last this turn.

moves.name: Dig
moves.desc: Digs underground turn 1, strikes turn 2.
moves.longDesc: This attack charges on the first turn and executes on the second. On the first turn, the user avoids all attacks other than Earthquake and Magnitude but takes double damage from them, and is also unaffected by weather. If the user is holding a Power Herb, the move completes in one turn.

moves.name: Dire Claw
moves.desc: 50% chance to sleep, poison, or paralyze target.
moves.longDesc: Has a 50% chance to cause the target to either fall asleep, become poisoned, or become paralyzed.

moves.name: Disable
moves.desc: For 4 turns, disables the target's last move used.
moves.longDesc: For 4 turns, the target's last move used becomes disabled. Fails if one of the target's moves is already disabled, if the target has not made a move, if the target no longer knows the move, or if the move was a Max or G-Max Move.

moves.name: Discharge
moves.desc: 30% chance to paralyze adjacent Pokemon.
moves.longDesc: Has a 30% chance to paralyze the target.

moves.name: Dive
moves.desc: Dives underwater turn 1, strikes turn 2.
moves.longDesc: This attack charges on the first turn and executes on the second. On the first turn, the user avoids all attacks other than Surf and Whirlpool but takes double damage from them, and is also unaffected by weather. If the user is holding a Power Herb, the move completes in one turn.

moves.name: Double Hit
moves.desc: Hits 2 times in one turn.
moves.longDesc: Hits twice. If the first hit breaks the target's substitute, it will take damage for the second hit.

moves.name: Double Team
moves.desc: Raises the user's evasiveness by 1.
moves.longDesc: Raises the user's evasiveness by 1 stage.

moves.name: Double-Edge
moves.desc: Has 33% recoil.
moves.longDesc: If the target lost HP, the user takes recoil damage equal to 33% the HP lost by the target, rounded half up, but not less than 1 HP.

moves.name: Draco Meteor
moves.desc: Lowers the user's Sp. Atk by 2.
moves.longDesc: Lowers the user's Special Attack by 2 stages.

moves.name: Dragon Cheer
moves.desc: Ally: Crit ratio +1, or +2 if ally is Dragon type.
moves.longDesc: Raises the target's chance for a critical hit by 1 stage, or by 2 stages if the target is Dragon type. Fails if there is no ally adjacent to the user, or if the target already has this effect or the Focus Energy effect. Baton Pass can be used to transfer this effect to an ally.

moves.name: Dragon Claw
moves.desc: No additional effect.
moves.longDesc: No additional effect.

moves.name: Dragon Dance
moves.desc: Raises the user's Attack and Speed by 1.
moves.longDesc: Raises the user's Attack and Speed by 1 stage.

moves.name: Dragon Darts
moves.desc: Hits twice. Doubles: Tries to hit each foe once.
moves.longDesc: Hits twice. If the first hit breaks the target's substitute, it will take damage for the second hit. In Double Battles, this move attempts to hit the targeted Pokemon and its ally once each. If hitting one of these Pokemon would be prevented by immunity, protection, semi-invulnerability, an Ability, or accuracy, it attempts to hit the other Pokemon twice instead. If this move is redirected, it hits that target twice.

moves.name: Dragon Pulse
moves.desc: No additional effect.
moves.longDesc: No additional effect.

moves.name: Dragon Rush
moves.desc: 20% chance to make the target flinch.
moves.longDesc: Has a 20% chance to make the target flinch. Damage doubles and no accuracy check is done if the target has used Minimize while active.

moves.name: Dragon Tail
moves.desc: Forces the target to switch to a random ally.
moves.longDesc: If both the user and the target have not fainted, the target is forced to switch out and be replaced with a random unfainted ally. This effect fails if the target used Ingrain previously, has the Suction Cups Ability, or this move hit a substitute.

moves.name: Drain Punch
moves.desc: User recovers 50% of the damage dealt.
moves.longDesc: The user recovers 1/2 the HP lost by the target, rounded half up. If Big Root is held by the user, the HP recovered is 1.3x normal, rounded half down.

moves.name: Draining Kiss
moves.desc: User recovers 75% of the damage dealt.
moves.longDesc: The user recovers 3/4 the HP lost by the target, rounded half up. If Big Root is held by the user, the HP recovered is 1.3x normal, rounded half down.

moves.name: Drill Peck
moves.desc: No additional effect.
moves.longDesc: No additional effect.

moves.name: Drill Run
moves.desc: High critical hit ratio.
moves.longDesc: Has a higher chance for a critical hit.

moves.name: Dual Wingbeat
moves.desc: Hits 2 times in one turn.
moves.longDesc: Hits twice. If the first hit breaks the target's substitute, it will take damage for the second hit.

moves.name: Dynamic Punch
moves.desc: 100% chance to confuse the target.
moves.longDesc: Has a 100% chance to confuse the target.

moves.name: Earth Power
moves.desc: 10% chance to lower the target's Sp. Def by 1.
moves.longDesc: Has a 10% chance to lower the target's Special Defense by 1 stage.

moves.name: Earthquake
moves.desc: Hits adjacent Pokemon. Double damage on Dig.
moves.longDesc: Damage doubles if the target is using Dig.

moves.name: Eerie Impulse
moves.desc: Lowers the target's Sp. Atk by 2.
moves.longDesc: Lowers the target's Special Attack by 2 stages.

moves.name: Eerie Spell
moves.desc: Removes 3 PP from the target's last move.
moves.longDesc: If this move is successful and the user has not fainted, the target loses 3 PP from its last move.

moves.name: Electric Terrain
moves.desc: 5 turns. Grounded: +Electric power, can't sleep.
moves.longDesc: For 5 turns, the terrain becomes Electric Terrain. During the effect, the power of Electric-type attacks made by grounded Pokemon is multiplied by 1.3 and grounded Pokemon cannot fall asleep; Pokemon already asleep do not wake up. Grounded Pokemon cannot become affected by Yawn or fall asleep from its effect. Camouflage transforms the user into an Electric type, Nature Power becomes Thunderbolt, and Secret Power has a 30% chance to cause paralysis. Fails if the current terrain is Electric Terrain.

moves.name: Electrify
moves.desc: Changes the target's move to Electric this turn.
moves.longDesc: Causes the target's move to become Electric type this turn. Among effects that can change a move's type, this effect happens last. Fails if the target already moved this turn.

moves.name: Electro Ball
moves.desc: More power the faster the user is than the target.
moves.longDesc: The power of this move depends on (user's current Speed / target's current Speed), rounded down. Power is equal to 150 if the result is 4 or more, 120 if 3, 80 if 2, 60 if 1, 40 if less than 1. If the target's current Speed is 0, this move's power is 40.

moves.name: Electro Shot
moves.desc: Raises Sp. Atk by 1, hits turn 2. Rain: no charge.
moves.longDesc: This attack charges on the first turn and executes on the second. Raises the user's Special Attack by 1 stage on the first turn. If the user is holding a Power Herb or the weather is Primordial Sea or Rain Dance, the move completes in one turn. If the user is holding Utility Umbrella and the weather is Primordial Sea or Rain Dance, the move still requires a turn to charge.

moves.name: Electroweb
moves.desc: 100% chance to lower the foe(s) Speed by 1.
moves.longDesc: Has a 100% chance to lower the target's Speed by 1 stage.

moves.name: Encore
moves.desc: Target repeats its last move for its next 3 turns.
moves.longDesc: For its next 3 turns, the target is forced to repeat its last move used. If the affected move runs out of PP, the effect ends. Fails if the target is already under this effect, if it has not made a move, if the move has 0 PP, or if the move is Assist, Blazing Torque, Combat Torque, Copycat, Dynamax Cannon, Encore, Magical Torque, Me First, Metronome, Mimic, Mirror Move, Nature Power, Noxious Torque, Sketch, Sleep Talk, Struggle, Transform, or Wicked Torque.

moves.name: Endeavor
moves.desc: Lowers the target's HP to the user's HP.
moves.longDesc: Deals damage to the target equal to (target's current HP - user's current HP). The target is unaffected if its current HP is less than or equal to the user's current HP.

moves.name: Endure
moves.desc: User survives attacks this turn with at least 1 HP.
moves.longDesc: The user will survive attacks made by other Pokemon during this turn with at least 1 HP. This move has a 1/X chance of being successful, where X starts at 1 and triples each time this move is successfully used. X resets to 1 if this move fails, if the user's last move used is not Baneful Bunker, Burning Bulwark, Detect, Endure, King's Shield, Max Guard, Obstruct, Protect, Quick Guard, Silk Trap, Spiky Shield, or Wide Guard, or if it was one of those moves and the user's protection was broken. Fails if the user moves last this turn.

moves.name: Energy Ball
moves.desc: 10% chance to lower the target's Sp. Def by 1.
moves.longDesc: Has a 10% chance to lower the target's Special Defense by 1 stage.

moves.name: Entrainment
moves.desc: The target's Ability changes to match the user's.
moves.longDesc: Causes the target's Ability to become the same as the user's. Fails if the target's Ability is As One, Battle Bond, Comatose, Disguise, Gulp Missile, Ice Face, Multitype, Power Construct, RKS System, Schooling, Shields Down, Stance Change, Tera Shift, Truant, Zen Mode, or Zero to Hero, or the same Ability as the user, or if the user's Ability is As One, Battle Bond, Comatose, Commander, Disguise, Embody Aspect, Flower Gift, Forecast, Hunger Switch, Ice Face, Illusion, Imposter, Multitype, Neutralizing Gas, Poison Puppeteer, Power Construct, Power of Alchemy, Protosynthesis, Quark Drive, Receiver, RKS System, Schooling, Shields Down, Stance Change, Tera Shell, Tera Shift, Teraform Zero, Trace, Wonder Guard, Zen Mode, or Zero to Hero.

moves.name: Eruption
moves.desc: Less power as user's HP decreases. Hits foe(s).
moves.longDesc: Power is equal to (user's current HP * 150 / user's maximum HP), rounded down, but not less than 1.

moves.name: Expanding Force
moves.desc: User on Psychic Terrain: 1.5x power, hits foes.
moves.longDesc: If the current terrain is Psychic Terrain and the user is grounded, this move hits all opposing Pokemon and has its power multiplied by 1.5.

moves.name: Explosion
moves.desc: Hits adjacent Pokemon. The user faints.
moves.longDesc: The user faints after using this move, even if this move fails for having no target. This move is prevented from executing if any active Pokemon has the Damp Ability.

moves.name: Extrasensory
moves.desc: 10% chance to make the target flinch.
moves.longDesc: Has a 10% chance to make the target flinch.

moves.name: Extreme Speed
moves.desc: Nearly always goes first.
moves.longDesc: No additional effect.

moves.name: Facade
moves.desc: Power doubles if user is burn/poison/paralyzed.
moves.longDesc: Power doubles if the user is burned, paralyzed, or poisoned. The physical damage halving effect from the user's burn is ignored.

moves.name: Fairy Lock
moves.desc: Prevents all Pokemon from switching next turn.
moves.longDesc: Prevents all active Pokemon from switching next turn. A Pokemon can still switch out if it is holding Shed Shell or uses Baton Pass, Flip Turn, Parting Shot, Teleport, U-turn, or Volt Switch. Fails if the effect is already active.

moves.name: Fake Out
moves.desc: Hits first. First turn out only. 100% flinch chance.
moves.longDesc: Has a 100% chance to make the target flinch. Fails unless it is the user's first turn on the field.

moves.name: Fake Tears
moves.desc: Lowers the target's Sp. Def by 2.
moves.longDesc: Lowers the target's Special Defense by 2 stages.

moves.name: Feather Dance
moves.desc: Lowers the target's Attack by 2.
moves.longDesc: Lowers the target's Attack by 2 stages.

moves.name: Feint
moves.desc: Nullifies Detect, Protect, and Quick/Wide Guard.
moves.longDesc: If this move is successful, it breaks through the target's Baneful Bunker, Detect, King's Shield, Protect, or Spiky Shield for this turn, allowing other Pokemon to attack the target normally. If the target's side is protected by Crafty Shield, Mat Block, Quick Guard, or Wide Guard, that protection is also broken for this turn and other Pokemon may attack the target's side normally.

moves.name: Fell Stinger
moves.desc: Raises user's Attack by 3 if this KOes the target.
moves.longDesc: Raises the user's Attack by 3 stages if this move knocks out the target.

moves.name: Fickle Beam
moves.desc: Has a 30% chance this move's power is doubled.
moves.longDesc: Has a 30% chance this move's power is doubled.

moves.name: Fiery Dance
moves.desc: 50% chance to raise the user's Sp. Atk by 1.
moves.longDesc: Has a 50% chance to raise the user's Special Attack by 1 stage.

moves.name: Final Gambit
moves.desc: Does damage equal to the user's HP. User faints.
moves.longDesc: Deals damage to the target equal to the user's current HP. If this move is successful, the user faints.

moves.name: Fire Blast
moves.desc: 10% chance to burn the target.
moves.longDesc: Has a 10% chance to burn the target.

moves.name: Fire Fang
moves.desc: 10% chance to burn. 10% chance to flinch.
moves.longDesc: Has a 10% chance to burn the target and a 10% chance to make it flinch.

moves.name: Fire Lash
moves.desc: 100% chance to lower the target's Defense by 1.
moves.longDesc: Has a 100% chance to lower the target's Defense by 1 stage.

moves.name: Fire Punch
moves.desc: 10% chance to burn the target.
moves.longDesc: Has a 10% chance to burn the target.

moves.name: Fire Spin
moves.desc: Traps and damages the target for 4-5 turns.
moves.longDesc: Prevents the target from switching for four or five turns (seven turns if the user is holding Grip Claw). Causes damage to the target equal to 1/8 of its maximum HP (1/6 if the user is holding Binding Band), rounded down, at the end of each turn during effect. The target can still switch out if it is holding Shed Shell or uses Baton Pass, Flip Turn, Parting Shot, Shed Tail, Teleport, U-turn, or Volt Switch. The effect ends if either the user or the target leaves the field, or if the target uses Mortal Spin, Rapid Spin, or Substitute successfully. This effect is not stackable or reset by using this or another binding move.

moves.name: First Impression
moves.desc: Nearly always goes first. First turn out only.
moves.longDesc: Fails unless it is the user's first turn on the field.

moves.name: Fissure
moves.desc: OHKOs the target. Fails if user is a lower level.
moves.longDesc: Deals damage to the target equal to the target's maximum HP. Ignores accuracy and evasiveness modifiers. This attack's accuracy is equal to (user's level - target's level + 30)%, and fails if the target is at a higher level. Pokemon with the Sturdy Ability are immune.

moves.name: Flail
moves.desc: More power the less HP the user has left.
moves.longDesc: The power of this move is 20 if X is 33 to 48, 40 if X is 17 to 32, 80 if X is 10 to 16, 100 if X is 5 to 9, 150 if X is 2 to 4, and 200 if X is 0 or 1, where X is equal to (user's current HP * 48 / user's maximum HP), rounded down.

moves.name: Flame Charge
moves.desc: 100% chance to raise the user's Speed by 1.
moves.longDesc: Has a 100% chance to raise the user's Speed by 1 stage.

moves.name: Flamethrower
moves.desc: 10% chance to burn the target.
moves.longDesc: Has a 10% chance to burn the target.

moves.name: Flare Blitz
moves.desc: Has 33% recoil. 10% chance to burn. Thaws user.
moves.longDesc: Has a 10% chance to burn the target. If the target lost HP, the user takes recoil damage equal to 33% the HP lost by the target, rounded half up, but not less than 1 HP.

moves.name: Flash Cannon
moves.desc: 10% chance to lower the target's Sp. Def by 1.
moves.longDesc: Has a 10% chance to lower the target's Special Defense by 1 stage.

moves.name: Flatter
moves.desc: Raises the target's Sp. Atk by 1 and confuses it.
moves.longDesc: Raises the target's Special Attack by 1 stage and confuses it.

moves.name: Fling
moves.desc: Flings the user's item at the target. Power varies.
moves.longDesc: The power of this move is based on the user's held item. The held item is lost and it activates for the target if applicable. If there is no target or the target avoids this move by protecting itself, the user's held item is still lost. The user can regain a thrown item with Recycle or the Harvest Ability. Fails if the user has no held item, if the held item cannot be thrown, if the user is under the effect of Embargo or Magic Room, or if the user has the Klutz Ability.

moves.name: Flip Turn
moves.desc: User switches out after damaging the target.
moves.longDesc: If this move is successful and the user has not fainted, the user switches out even if it is trapped and is replaced immediately by a selected party member. The user does not switch out if there are no unfainted party members, or if the target switched out using an Eject Button or through the effect of the Emergency Exit or Wimp Out Abilities.

moves.name: Flower Trick
moves.desc: Always results in a critical hit; no accuracy check.
moves.longDesc: This move is always a critical hit unless the target is under the effect of Lucky Chant or has the Battle Armor or Shell Armor Abilities. This move does not check accuracy.

moves.name: Fly
moves.desc: Flies up on first turn, then strikes the next turn.
moves.longDesc: This attack charges on the first turn and executes on the second. On the first turn, the user avoids all attacks other than Gust, Hurricane, Sky Uppercut, Smack Down, Thousand Arrows, Thunder, and Twister, and Gust and Twister have doubled power when used against it. If the user is holding a Power Herb, the move completes in one turn.

moves.name: Flying Press
moves.desc: Combines Flying in its type effectiveness.
moves.longDesc: This move combines Flying in its type effectiveness against the target. Damage doubles and no accuracy check is done if the target has used Minimize while active.

moves.name: Focus Blast
moves.desc: 10% chance to lower the target's Sp. Def by 1.
moves.longDesc: Has a 10% chance to lower the target's Special Defense by 1 stage.

moves.name: Focus Energy
moves.desc: Raises the user's critical hit ratio by 2.
moves.longDesc: Raises the user's chance for a critical hit by 2 stages. Fails if the user already has the effect. Baton Pass can be used to transfer this effect to an ally.

moves.name: Focus Punch
moves.desc: Fails if the user takes damage before it hits.
moves.longDesc: The user loses its focus and does nothing if it is hit by a damaging attack this turn before it can execute the move.

moves.name: Follow Me
moves.desc: The foes' moves target the user on the turn used.
moves.longDesc: Until the end of the turn, all single-target attacks from the opposing side are redirected to the user. Such attacks are redirected to the user before they can be reflected by Magic Coat or the Magic Bounce Ability, or drawn in by the Lightning Rod or Storm Drain Abilities. Fails if it is not a Double Battle or Battle Royal. This effect is ignored while the user is under the effect of Sky Drop.

moves.name: Foul Play
moves.desc: Uses target's Attack stat in damage calculation.
moves.longDesc: Damage is calculated using the target's Attack stat, including stat stage changes. The user's Ability, item, and burn are used as normal.

moves.name: Freeze-Dry
moves.desc: 10% chance to freeze. Super effective on Water.
moves.longDesc: Has a 10% chance to freeze the target. This move's type effectiveness against Water is changed to be super effective no matter what this move's type is.

moves.name: Frenzy Plant
moves.desc: User cannot move next turn.
moves.longDesc: If this move is successful, the user must recharge on the following turn and cannot select a move.

moves.name: Frost Breath
moves.desc: Always results in a critical hit.
moves.longDesc: This move is always a critical hit unless the target is under the effect of Lucky Chant or has the Battle Armor or Shell Armor Abilities.

moves.name: Future Sight
moves.desc: Hits two turns after being used.
moves.longDesc: Deals damage two turns after this move is used. At the end of that turn, the damage is calculated at that time and dealt to the Pokemon at the position the target had when the move was used. If the user is no longer active at the time, damage is calculated based on the user's natural Special Attack stat, types, and level, with no boosts from its held item or Ability. Fails if this move or Doom Desire is already in effect for the target's position.

moves.name: Gastro Acid
moves.desc: Nullifies the target's Ability.
moves.longDesc: Causes the target's Ability to be rendered ineffective as long as it remains active. If the target uses Baton Pass, the replacement will remain under this effect. If the target's Ability is As One, Battle Bond, Comatose, Disguise, Gulp Missile, Ice Face, Multitype, Power Construct, RKS System, Schooling, Shields Down, Stance Change, Tera Shift, Zen Mode, or Zero to Hero, this move fails, and receiving the effect through Baton Pass ends the effect immediately.

moves.name: Giga Drain
moves.desc: User recovers 50% of the damage dealt.
moves.longDesc: The user recovers 1/2 the HP lost by the target, rounded half up. If Big Root is held by the user, the HP recovered is 1.3x normal, rounded half down.

moves.name: Giga Impact
moves.desc: User cannot move next turn.
moves.longDesc: If this move is successful, the user must recharge on the following turn and cannot select a move.

moves.name: Gigaton Hammer
moves.desc: Cannot be selected the turn after it's used.
moves.longDesc: Cannot be selected the turn after it's used.

moves.name: Glare
moves.desc: Paralyzes the target.
moves.longDesc: Paralyzes the target.

moves.name: Grass Knot
moves.desc: More power the heavier the target.
moves.longDesc: This move's power is 20 if the target weighs less than 10 kg, 40 if less than 25 kg, 60 if less than 50 kg, 80 if less than 100 kg, 100 if less than 200 kg, and 120 if greater than or equal to 200 kg.

moves.name: Grassy Glide
moves.desc: User on Grassy Terrain: +1 priority.
moves.longDesc: If the current terrain is Grassy Terrain and the user is grounded, this move has its priority increased by 1.

moves.name: Grassy Terrain
moves.desc: 5 turns. Grounded: +Grass power, +1/16 max HP.
moves.longDesc: For 5 turns, the terrain becomes Grassy Terrain. During the effect, the power of Grass-type attacks used by grounded Pokemon is multiplied by 1.3, the power of Bulldoze, Earthquake, and Magnitude used against grounded Pokemon is multiplied by 0.5, and grounded Pokemon have 1/16 of their maximum HP, rounded down, restored at the end of each turn, including the last turn. Camouflage transforms the user into a Grass type, Nature Power becomes Energy Ball, and Secret Power has a 30% chance to cause sleep. Fails if the current terrain is Grassy Terrain.

moves.name: Grav Apple
moves.desc: Target: 100% -1 Def. During Gravity: 1.5x power.
moves.longDesc: Has a 100% chance to lower the target's Defense by 1 stage. Power is multiplied by 1.5 during Gravity's effect.

moves.name: Gravity
moves.desc: 5 turns: no Ground immunities, 1.67x accuracy.
moves.longDesc: For 5 turns, the evasiveness of all active Pokemon is multiplied by 0.6. At the time of use, Bounce, Fly, Magnet Rise, Sky Drop, and Telekinesis end immediately for all active Pokemon. During the effect, Bounce, Fly, Flying Press, High Jump Kick, Jump Kick, Magnet Rise, Sky Drop, Splash, and Telekinesis are prevented from being used by all active Pokemon. Ground-type attacks, Spikes, Toxic Spikes, Sticky Web, and the Arena Trap Ability can affect Flying types or Pokemon with the Levitate Ability. Fails if this move is already in effect.

moves.name: Growth
moves.desc: Raises user's Attack and Sp. Atk by 1; 2 in Sun.
moves.longDesc: Raises the user's Attack and Special Attack by 1 stage. If the weather is Sunny Day or Desolate Land, this move raises the user's Attack and Special Attack by 2 stages. If the user is holding Utility Umbrella, this move will only raise the user's Attack and Special Attack by 1 stage, even if the weather is Sunny Day or Desolate Land.

moves.name: Guard Split
moves.desc: Averages Defense and Sp. Def stats with target.
moves.longDesc: The user and the target have their Defense and Special Defense stats set to be equal to the average of the user and the target's Defense and Special Defense stats, respectively, rounded down. Stat stage changes are unaffected.

moves.name: Guard Swap
moves.desc: Swaps Defense and Sp. Def changes with target.
moves.longDesc: The user swaps its Defense and Special Defense stat stage changes with the target.

moves.name: Guillotine
moves.desc: OHKOs the target. Fails if user is a lower level.
moves.longDesc: Deals damage to the target equal to the target's maximum HP. Ignores accuracy and evasiveness modifiers. This attack's accuracy is equal to (user's level - target's level + 30)%, and fails if the target is at a higher level. Pokemon with the Sturdy Ability are immune.

moves.name: Gunk Shot
moves.desc: 30% chance to poison the target.
moves.longDesc: Has a 30% chance to poison the target.

moves.name: Gyro Ball
moves.desc: More power the slower the user than the target.
moves.longDesc: Power is equal to (25 * target's current Speed / user's current Speed) + 1, rounded down, but not more than 150. If the user's current Speed is 0, this move's power is 1.

moves.name: Hammer Arm
moves.desc: Lowers the user's Speed by 1.
moves.longDesc: Lowers the user's Speed by 1 stage.

moves.name: Hard Press
moves.desc: More power the more HP the target has left.
moves.longDesc: Power is equal to 100 * (target's current HP / target's maximum HP), rounded half down, but not less than 1.

moves.name: Haze
moves.desc: Eliminates all stat changes.
moves.longDesc: Resets the stat stages of all active Pokemon to 0.

moves.name: Head Smash
moves.desc: Has 1/2 recoil.
moves.longDesc: If the target lost HP, the user takes recoil damage equal to 1/2 the HP lost by the target, rounded half up, but not less than 1 HP.

moves.name: Headlong Rush
moves.desc: Lowers the user's Defense and Sp. Def by 1.
moves.longDesc: Lowers the user's Defense and Special Defense by 1 stage.

moves.name: Heal Bell
moves.desc: Cures the user's party of all status conditions.
moves.longDesc: Every Pokemon in the user's party is cured of its non-volatile status condition. Active Pokemon with the Soundproof Ability are not cured, unless they are the user.

moves.name: Heal Pulse
moves.desc: Heals the target by 50% of its max HP.
moves.longDesc: The target restores 1/2 of its maximum HP, rounded half up. If the user has the Mega Launcher Ability, the target instead restores 3/4 of its maximum HP, rounded half down.

moves.name: Healing Wish
moves.desc: User faints. Next hurt Pokemon is fully healed.
moves.longDesc: The user faints, and if the Pokemon brought out to replace it does not have full HP or has a non-volatile status condition, its HP is fully restored along with having any non-volatile status condition cured. The replacement is sent out at the end of the turn, and the healing happens before hazards take effect. This effect continues until a Pokemon that meets either of these conditions switches in at the user's position or gets swapped into the position with Ally Switch. Fails if the user is the last unfainted Pokemon in its party.

moves.name: Heat Crash
moves.desc: More power the heavier the user than the target.
moves.longDesc: The power of this move depends on (user's weight / target's weight), rounded down. Power is equal to 120 if the result is 5 or more, 100 if 4, 80 if 3, 60 if 2, and 40 if 1 or less. Damage doubles and no accuracy check is done if the target has used Minimize while active.

moves.name: Heat Wave
moves.desc: 10% chance to burn the foe(s).
moves.longDesc: Has a 10% chance to burn the target.

moves.name: Heavy Slam
moves.desc: More power the heavier the user than the target.
moves.longDesc: The power of this move depends on (user's weight / target's weight), rounded down. Power is equal to 120 if the result is 5 or more, 100 if 4, 80 if 3, 60 if 2, and 40 if 1 or less. Damage doubles and no accuracy check is done if the target has used Minimize while active.

moves.name: Helping Hand
moves.desc: One adjacent ally's move power is 1.5x this turn.
moves.longDesc: The power of the target's attack this turn is multiplied by 1.5 (this effect is stackable). Fails if there is no ally adjacent to the user or if the ally already moved this turn, but does not fail if the ally is using a two-turn move.

moves.name: Hex
moves.desc: Power doubles if the target has a status ailment.
moves.longDesc: Power doubles if the target has a non-volatile status condition.

moves.name: High Horsepower
moves.desc: No additional effect.
moves.longDesc: No additional effect.

moves.name: High Jump Kick
moves.desc: User is hurt by 50% of its max HP if it misses.
moves.longDesc: If this attack is not successful, the user loses half of its maximum HP, rounded down, as crash damage. Pokemon with the Magic Guard Ability are unaffected by crash damage.

moves.name: Horn Drill
moves.desc: OHKOs the target. Fails if user is a lower level.
moves.longDesc: Deals damage to the target equal to the target's maximum HP. Ignores accuracy and evasiveness modifiers. This attack's accuracy is equal to (user's level - target's level + 30)%, and fails if the target is at a higher level. Pokemon with the Sturdy Ability are immune.

moves.name: Horn Leech
moves.desc: User recovers 50% of the damage dealt.
moves.longDesc: The user recovers 1/2 the HP lost by the target, rounded half up. If Big Root is held by the user, the HP recovered is 1.3x normal, rounded half down.

moves.name: Howl
moves.desc: Raises the user's and ally's Attack by 1.
moves.longDesc: Raises the Attack of the user and all allies 1 stage.

moves.name: Hurricane
moves.desc: 30% chance to confuse target. Can't miss in rain.
moves.longDesc: Has a 30% chance to confuse the target. This move can hit a target using Bounce, Fly, or Sky Drop, or is under the effect of Sky Drop. If the weather is Primordial Sea or Rain Dance, this move does not check accuracy. If the weather is Desolate Land or Sunny Day, this move's accuracy is 50%. If this move is used against a Pokemon holding Utility Umbrella, this move's accuracy remains at 70%.

moves.name: Hydro Cannon
moves.desc: User cannot move next turn.
moves.longDesc: If this move is successful, the user must recharge on the following turn and cannot select a move.

moves.name: Hydro Pump
moves.desc: No additional effect.
moves.longDesc: No additional effect.

moves.name: Hyper Beam
moves.desc: User cannot move next turn.
moves.longDesc: If this move is successful, the user must recharge on the following turn and cannot select a move.

moves.name: Hyper Voice
moves.desc: No additional effect. Hits adjacent foes.
moves.longDesc: No additional effect.

moves.name: Hypnosis
moves.desc: Causes the target to fall asleep.
moves.longDesc: Causes the target to fall asleep.

moves.name: Ice Beam
moves.desc: 10% chance to freeze the target.
moves.longDesc: Has a 10% chance to freeze the target.

moves.name: Ice Fang
moves.desc: 10% chance to freeze. 10% chance to flinch.
moves.longDesc: Has a 10% chance to freeze the target and a 10% chance to make it flinch.

moves.name: Ice Hammer
moves.desc: Lowers the user's Speed by 1.
moves.longDesc: Lowers the user's Speed by 1 stage.

moves.name: Ice Punch
moves.desc: 10% chance to freeze the target.
moves.longDesc: Has a 10% chance to freeze the target.

moves.name: Ice Shard
moves.desc: Usually goes first.
moves.longDesc: No additional effect.

moves.name: Ice Spinner
moves.desc: Ends the effects of terrain.
moves.longDesc: Ends the effects of Electric Terrain, Grassy Terrain, Misty Terrain, and Psychic Terrain.

moves.name: Icicle Crash
moves.desc: 30% chance to make the target flinch.
moves.longDesc: Has a 30% chance to make the target flinch.

moves.name: Icicle Spear
moves.desc: Hits 2-5 times in one turn.
moves.longDesc: Hits two to five times. Has a 35% chance to hit two or three times and a 15% chance to hit four or five times. If one of the hits breaks the target's substitute, it will take damage for the remaining hits. If the user has the Skill Link Ability, this move will always hit five times. If the user is holding Loaded Dice, this move will hit 4-5 times.

moves.name: Icy Wind
moves.desc: 100% chance to lower the foe(s) Speed by 1.
moves.longDesc: Has a 100% chance to lower the target's Speed by 1 stage.

moves.name: Imprison
moves.desc: No foe can use any move known by the user.
moves.longDesc: The user prevents all opposing Pokemon from using any moves that the user also knows as long as the user remains active.

moves.name: Infernal Parade
moves.desc: 30% burn. 2x power if target is already statused.
moves.longDesc: Has a 30% chance to burn the target. Power doubles if the target has a non-volatile status condition.

moves.name: Inferno
moves.desc: 100% chance to burn the target.
moves.longDesc: Has a 100% chance to burn the target.

moves.name: Infestation
moves.desc: Traps and damages the target for 4-5 turns.
moves.longDesc: Prevents the target from switching for four or five turns (seven turns if the user is holding Grip Claw). Causes damage to the target equal to 1/8 of its maximum HP (1/6 if the user is holding Binding Band), rounded down, at the end of each turn during effect. The target can still switch out if it is holding Shed Shell or uses Baton Pass, Flip Turn, Parting Shot, Shed Tail, Teleport, U-turn, or Volt Switch. The effect ends if either the user or the target leaves the field, or if the target uses Mortal Spin, Rapid Spin, or Substitute successfully. This effect is not stackable or reset by using this or another binding move.

moves.name: Ingrain
moves.desc: Traps/grounds user; heals 1/16 max HP per turn.
moves.longDesc: The user has 1/16 of its maximum HP restored at the end of each turn, but it is prevented from switching out and other Pokemon cannot force the user to switch out. The user can still switch out if it uses Baton Pass, Flip Turn, Parting Shot, Teleport, U-turn, or Volt Switch. If the user leaves the field using Baton Pass, the replacement will remain trapped and still receive the healing effect. During the effect, the user can be hit normally by Ground-type attacks and be affected by Spikes, Toxic Spikes, and Sticky Web, even if the user is a Flying type or has the Levitate Ability.

moves.name: Instruct
moves.desc: The target immediately uses its last used move.
moves.longDesc: The target immediately uses its last used move. Fails if the target has not made a move, if the move has 0 PP, if the target is preparing to use Beak Blast, Focus Punch, or Shell Trap, or if the move is Assist, Beak Blast, Belch, Bide, Blazing Torque, Celebrate, Chatter, Combat Torque, Copycat, Dynamax Cannon, Focus Punch, Hold Hands, Ice Ball, Instruct, King's Shield, Magical Torque, Me First, Metronome, Mimic, Mirror Move, Nature Power, Noxious Torque, Obstruct, Outrage, Petal Dance, Rollout, Shell Trap, Sketch, Sleep Talk, Struggle, Thrash, Transform, Uproar, Wicked Torque, any two-turn move, or any recharge move.

moves.name: Iron Defense
moves.desc: Raises the user's Defense by 2.
moves.longDesc: Raises the user's Defense by 2 stages.

moves.name: Iron Head
moves.desc: 30% chance to make the target flinch.
moves.longDesc: Has a 30% chance to make the target flinch.

moves.name: Iron Tail
moves.desc: 30% chance to lower the target's Defense by 1.
moves.longDesc: Has a 30% chance to lower the target's Defense by 1 stage.

moves.name: Jet Punch
moves.desc: Usually goes first.
moves.longDesc: No additional effect.

moves.name: Knock Off
moves.desc: 1.5x damage if foe holds an item. Removes item.
moves.longDesc: This move's power is multiplied by 1.5 if the target is holding an item, and the target loses its held item if the user has not fainted. A target with the Sticky Hold Ability does not lose its held item if it has not fainted. This move does not increase in power or remove the target's item if it is a Blue Orb, Red Orb, Adamant Crystal, Lustrous Globe, Griseous Core, Plate, Drive, Memory, Rusted Sword, Rusted Shield, Booster Energy, or Mask held by a Kyogre, Groudon, Dialga, Palkia, Giratina, Arceus, Genesect, Silvally, Zacian, Zamazenta, Paradox Pokemon, or Ogerpon, respectively, or if the user is one of those species and the target is holding the respective item. In this case, Paradox Pokemon include every species with the Protosynthesis and Quark Drive Abilities, except Gouging Fire, Raging Bolt, Iron Boulder, and Iron Crown. Items lost to this move cannot be regained with Recycle or the Harvest Ability.

moves.name: Kowtow Cleave
moves.desc: This move does not check accuracy.
moves.longDesc: This move does not check accuracy.

moves.name: Lash Out
moves.desc: 2x power if the user had a stat lowered this turn.
moves.longDesc: Power doubles if the user had a stat stage lowered this turn.

moves.name: Last Resort
moves.desc: Fails unless each known move has been used.
moves.longDesc: This move fails unless the user knows this move and at least one other move, and has used all the other moves it knows at least once each since it became active or Transformed.

moves.name: Last Respects
moves.desc: +50 power for each time a party member fainted.
moves.longDesc: Power is equal to 50+(X*50), where X is the total number of times any Pokemon has fainted on the user's side, and X cannot be greater than 100.

moves.name: Lava Plume
moves.desc: 30% chance to burn adjacent Pokemon.
moves.longDesc: Has a 30% chance to burn the target.

moves.name: Leaf Blade
moves.desc: High critical hit ratio.
moves.longDesc: Has a higher chance for a critical hit.

moves.name: Leaf Storm
moves.desc: Lowers the user's Sp. Atk by 2.
moves.longDesc: Lowers the user's Special Attack by 2 stages.

moves.name: Leech Life
moves.desc: User recovers 50% of the damage dealt.
moves.longDesc: The user recovers 1/2 the HP lost by the target, rounded half up. If Big Root is held by the user, the HP recovered is 1.3x normal, rounded half down.

moves.name: Leech Seed
moves.desc: 1/8 of target's HP is restored to user every turn.
moves.longDesc: The Pokemon at the user's position steals 1/8 of the target's maximum HP, rounded down, at the end of each turn. If Big Root is held by the recipient, the HP recovered is 1.3x normal, rounded half down. If the target uses Baton Pass, the replacement will continue being leeched. If the target switches out or uses Mortal Spin or Rapid Spin successfully, the effect ends. Grass-type Pokemon are immune to this move on use, but not its effect.

moves.name: Life Dew
moves.desc: Heals the user and its allies by 1/4 their max HP.
moves.longDesc: Each Pokemon on the user's side restores 1/4 of its maximum HP, rounded half up.

moves.name: Light Screen
moves.desc: For 5 turns, special damage to allies is halved.
moves.longDesc: For 5 turns, the user and its party members take 0.5x damage from special attacks, or 0.66x damage if in a Double Battle. Damage is not reduced further with Aurora Veil. Critical hits ignore this effect. It is removed from the user's side if the user or an ally is successfully hit by Brick Break, Psychic Fangs, or Defog. Lasts for 8 turns if the user is holding Light Clay. Fails if the effect is already active on the user's side.

moves.name: Light of Ruin
moves.desc: Has 1/2 recoil.
moves.longDesc: If the target lost HP, the user takes recoil damage equal to 1/2 the HP lost by the target, rounded half up, but not less than 1 HP.

moves.name: Liquidation
moves.desc: 20% chance to lower the target's Defense by 1.
moves.longDesc: Has a 20% chance to lower the target's Defense by 1 stage.

moves.name: Lock-On
moves.desc: User's next move will not miss the target.
moves.longDesc: Until the end of the next turn, the target cannot avoid the user's moves, even if the target is in the middle of a two-turn move. The effect ends if either the user or the target leaves the field. Fails if this effect is active for the user.

moves.name: Low Kick
moves.desc: More power the heavier the target.
moves.longDesc: This move's power is 20 if the target weighs less than 10 kg, 40 if less than 25 kg, 60 if less than 50 kg, 80 if less than 100 kg, 100 if less than 200 kg, and 120 if greater than or equal to 200 kg.

moves.name: Low Sweep
moves.desc: 100% chance to lower the target's Speed by 1.
moves.longDesc: Has a 100% chance to lower the target's Speed by 1 stage.

moves.name: Lumina Crash
moves.desc: 100% chance to lower the target's Sp. Def by 2.
moves.longDesc: Has a 100% chance to lower the target's Special Defense by 2 stages.

moves.name: Lunge
moves.desc: 100% chance to lower the target's Attack by 1.
moves.longDesc: Has a 100% chance to lower the target's Attack by 1 stage.

moves.name: Mach Punch
moves.desc: Usually goes first.
moves.longDesc: No additional effect.

moves.name: Magic Powder
moves.desc: Changes the target's type to Psychic.
moves.longDesc: Causes the target to become a Psychic type. Fails if the target is an Arceus or a Silvally, if the target is already purely Psychic type, or if the target is Terastallized.

moves.name: Magic Room
moves.desc: For 5 turns, all held items have no effect.
moves.longDesc: For 5 turns, the held items of all active Pokemon have no effect. An item's effect of causing forme changes is unaffected, but any other effects from such items are negated. During the effect, Fling and Natural Gift are prevented from being used by all active Pokemon. If this move is used during the effect, the effect ends.

moves.name: Magnet Rise
moves.desc: For 5 turns, the user has immunity to Ground.
moves.longDesc: For 5 turns, the user is immune to Ground-type attacks and the effects of Spikes, Toxic Spikes, Sticky Web, and the Arena Trap Ability as long as it remains active. If the user uses Baton Pass, the replacement will gain the effect. Ingrain, Smack Down, Thousand Arrows, and Iron Ball override this move if the user is under any of their effects. Fails if the user is already under this effect or the effects of Ingrain, Smack Down, or Thousand Arrows.

moves.name: Magnetic Flux
moves.desc: Raises Def, Sp. Def of allies with Plus/Minus by 1.
moves.longDesc: Raises the Defense and Special Defense of Pokemon on the user's side with the Plus or Minus Abilities by 1 stage.

moves.name: Make It Rain
moves.desc: Lowers the user's Sp. Atk by 1. Hits foe(s).
moves.longDesc: Lowers the user's Special Attack by 1 stage.

moves.name: Matcha Gotcha
moves.desc: 20% burn. Recovers 50% dmg dealt. Thaws foe(s).
moves.longDesc: Has a 20% chance to burn the target. The user recovers 1/2 the HP lost by the target, rounded half up. If Big Root is held by the user, the HP recovered is 1.3x normal, rounded half down. The target thaws out if it is frozen.

moves.name: Mean Look
moves.desc: Prevents the target from switching out.
moves.longDesc: Prevents the target from switching out. The target can still switch out if it is holding Shed Shell or uses Baton Pass, Flip Turn, Parting Shot, Teleport, U-turn, or Volt Switch. The effect ends if either the user or the target leaves the field.

moves.name: Mega Kick
moves.desc: No additional effect.
moves.longDesc: No additional effect.

moves.name: Megahorn
moves.desc: No additional effect.
moves.longDesc: No additional effect.

moves.name: Memento
moves.desc: Lowers target's Attack, Sp. Atk by 2. User faints.
moves.longDesc: Lowers the target's Attack and Special Attack by 2 stages. The user faints unless this move misses or there is no target. Fails entirely if this move hits a substitute, but does not fail if the target's stats cannot be changed.

moves.name: Metal Burst
moves.desc: If hit by an attack, returns 1.5x damage.
moves.longDesc: Deals damage to the last opposing Pokemon to hit the user with a physical or special attack this turn equal to 1.5 times the HP lost by the user from that attack, rounded down. If the user did not lose HP from that attack, this move deals 1 HP of damage instead. If that opposing Pokemon's position is no longer in use and there is another opposing Pokemon on the field, the damage is done to it instead. Only the last hit of a multi-hit attack is counted. Fails if the user was not hit by an opposing Pokemon's physical or special attack this turn.

moves.name: Metal Sound
moves.desc: Lowers the target's Sp. Def by 2.
moves.longDesc: Lowers the target's Special Defense by 2 stages.

moves.name: Meteor Beam
moves.desc: Raises user's Sp. Atk by 1 on turn 1. Hits turn 2.
moves.longDesc: This attack charges on the first turn and executes on the second. Raises the user's Special Attack by 1 stage on the first turn. If the user is holding a Power Herb, the move completes in one turn.

moves.name: Meteor Mash
moves.desc: 20% chance to raise the user's Attack by 1.
moves.longDesc: Has a 20% chance to raise the user's Attack by 1 stage.

moves.name: Minimize
moves.desc: Raises the user's evasiveness by 2.
moves.longDesc: Raises the user's evasiveness by 2 stages. Whether or not the user's evasiveness was changed, Body Slam, Dragon Rush, Flying Press, Heat Crash, Heavy Slam, Malicious Moonsault, Steamroller, Stomp, and Supercell Slam will not check accuracy and have their damage doubled if used against the user while it is active.

moves.name: Mirror Coat
moves.desc: If hit by special attack, returns double damage.
moves.longDesc: Deals damage to the last opposing Pokemon to hit the user with a special attack this turn equal to twice the HP lost by the user from that attack. If the user did not lose HP from the attack, this move deals 1 HP of damage instead. If that opposing Pokemon's position is no longer in use and there is another opposing Pokemon on the field, the damage is done to it instead. Only the last hit of a multi-hit attack is counted. Fails if the user was not hit by an opposing Pokemon's special attack this turn.

moves.name: Misty Explosion
moves.desc: User faints. User on Misty Terrain: 1.5x power.
moves.longDesc: If the current terrain is Misty Terrain and the user is grounded, this move's power is multiplied by 1.5. The user faints after using this move, even if this move fails for having no target. This move is prevented from executing if any active Pokemon has the Damp Ability.

moves.name: Misty Terrain
moves.desc: 5 turns. Can't status,-Dragon power vs grounded.
moves.longDesc: For 5 turns, the terrain becomes Misty Terrain. During the effect, the power of Dragon-type attacks used against grounded Pokemon is multiplied by 0.5 and grounded Pokemon cannot be inflicted with a non-volatile status condition nor confusion. Grounded Pokemon can become affected by Yawn but cannot fall asleep from its effect. Camouflage transforms the user into a Fairy type, Nature Power becomes Moonblast, and Secret Power has a 30% chance to lower Special Attack by 1 stage. Fails if the current terrain is Misty Terrain.

moves.name: Moonblast
moves.desc: 30% chance to lower the target's Sp. Atk by 1.
moves.longDesc: Has a 30% chance to lower the target's Special Attack by 1 stage.

moves.name: Moonlight
moves.desc: Heals the user by a weather-dependent amount.
moves.longDesc: The user restores 1/2 of its maximum HP if Delta Stream or no weather conditions are in effect or if the user is holding Utility Umbrella, 2/3 of its maximum HP if the weather is Desolate Land or Sunny Day, and 1/4 of its maximum HP if the weather is Primordial Sea, Rain Dance, Sandstorm, or Snow, all rounded half down.

moves.name: Morning Sun
moves.desc: Heals the user by a weather-dependent amount.
moves.longDesc: The user restores 1/2 of its maximum HP if Delta Stream or no weather conditions are in effect or if the user is holding Utility Umbrella, 2/3 of its maximum HP if the weather is Desolate Land or Sunny Day, and 1/4 of its maximum HP if the weather is Primordial Sea, Rain Dance, Sandstorm, or Snow, all rounded half down.

moves.name: Mortal Spin
moves.desc: Poisons foes, frees user from hazards/bind/leech.
moves.longDesc: If this move is successful and the user has not fainted, the effects of Leech Seed and binding moves end for the user, and all hazards are removed from the user's side of the field. Has a 100% chance to poison the target.

moves.name: Mountain Gale
moves.desc: 30% chance to make the target flinch.
moves.longDesc: Has a 30% chance to make the target flinch.

moves.name: Mud Shot
moves.desc: 100% chance to lower the target's Speed by 1.
moves.longDesc: Has a 100% chance to lower the target's Speed by 1 stage.

moves.name: Mud-Slap
moves.desc: 100% chance to lower the target's accuracy by 1.
moves.longDesc: Has a 100% chance to lower the target's accuracy by 1 stage.

moves.name: Muddy Water
moves.desc: 30% chance to lower the foe(s) accuracy by 1.
moves.longDesc: Has a 30% chance to lower the target's accuracy by 1 stage.

moves.name: Mystical Fire
moves.desc: 100% chance to lower the target's Sp. Atk by 1.
moves.longDesc: Has a 100% chance to lower the target's Special Attack by 1 stage.

moves.name: Nasty Plot
moves.desc: Raises the user's Sp. Atk by 2.
moves.longDesc: Raises the user's Special Attack by 2 stages.

moves.name: Night Daze
moves.desc: 40% chance to lower the target's accuracy by 1.
moves.longDesc: Has a 40% chance to lower the target's accuracy by 1 stage.

moves.name: Night Shade
moves.desc: Does damage equal to the user's level.
moves.longDesc: Deals damage to the target equal to the user's level.

moves.name: Night Slash
moves.desc: High critical hit ratio.
moves.longDesc: Has a higher chance for a critical hit.

moves.name: No Retreat
moves.desc: Raises all stats by 1 (not acc/eva). Traps user.
moves.longDesc: Raises the user's Attack, Defense, Special Attack, Special Defense, and Speed by 1 stage, but it becomes prevented from switching out. The user can still switch out if it uses Baton Pass, Flip Turn, Parting Shot, Teleport, U-turn, or Volt Switch. Fails if the user has already been prevented from switching by this effect.

moves.name: Noble Roar
moves.desc: Lowers the target's Attack and Sp. Atk by 1.
moves.longDesc: Lowers the target's Attack and Special Attack by 1 stage.

moves.name: Nuzzle
moves.desc: 100% chance to paralyze the target.
moves.longDesc: Has a 100% chance to paralyze the target.

moves.name: Outrage
moves.desc: Lasts 2-3 turns. Confuses the user afterwards.
moves.longDesc: The user spends two or three turns locked into this move and becomes confused immediately after its move on the last turn of the effect if it is not already. This move targets an opposing Pokemon at random on each turn. If the user is prevented from moving, is asleep at the beginning of a turn, or the attack is not successful against the target on the first turn of the effect or the second turn of a three-turn effect, the effect ends without causing confusion. If this move is called by Sleep Talk and the user is asleep, the move is used for one turn and does not confuse the user.

moves.name: Overheat
moves.desc: Lowers the user's Sp. Atk by 2.
moves.longDesc: Lowers the user's Special Attack by 2 stages.

moves.name: Pain Split
moves.desc: Shares HP of user and target equally.
moves.longDesc: The user and the target's HP become the average of their current HP, rounded down, but not more than the maximum HP of either one.

moves.name: Parabolic Charge
moves.desc: User recovers 50% of the damage dealt.
moves.longDesc: The user recovers 1/2 the HP lost by the target, rounded half up. If Big Root is held by the user, the HP recovered is 1.3x normal, rounded half down.

moves.name: Parting Shot
moves.desc: Lowers target's Atk, Sp. Atk by 1. User switches.
moves.longDesc: Lowers the target's Attack and Special Attack by 1 stage. If this move is successful, the user switches out even if it is trapped and is replaced immediately by a selected party member. The user does not switch out if the target's Attack and Special Attack stat stages were both unchanged, or if there are no unfainted party members.

moves.name: Payback
moves.desc: Power doubles if the user moves after the target.
moves.longDesc: Power doubles if the user moves after the target this turn, including actions taken through Instruct or the Dancer Ability. Switching in does not count as an action.

moves.name: Perish Song
moves.desc: All active Pokemon will faint in 3 turns.
moves.longDesc: Each active Pokemon receives a perish count of 4 if it doesn't already have a perish count. At the end of each turn including the turn used, the perish count of all active Pokemon lowers by 1 and Pokemon faint if the number reaches 0. The perish count is removed from Pokemon that switch out. If a Pokemon uses Baton Pass while it has a perish count, the replacement will gain the perish count and continue to count down.

moves.name: Petal Blizzard
moves.desc: No additional effect. Hits adjacent Pokemon.
moves.longDesc: No additional effect.

moves.name: Petal Dance
moves.desc: Lasts 2-3 turns. Confuses the user afterwards.
