moves.longDesc: The user spends two or three turns locked into this move and becomes confused immediately after its move on the last turn of the effect if it is not already. This move targets an opposing Pokemon at random on each turn. If the user is prevented from moving, is asleep at the beginning of a turn, or the attack is not successful against the target on the first turn of the effect or the second turn of a three-turn effect, the effect ends without causing confusion. If this move is called by Sleep Talk and the user is asleep, the move is used for one turn and does not confuse the user.

moves.name: Phantom Force
moves.desc: Disappears turn 1. Hits turn 2. Breaks protection.
moves.longDesc: If this move is successful, it breaks through the target's Baneful Bunker, Detect, King's Shield, Protect, or Spiky Shield for this turn, allowing other Pokemon to attack the target normally. If the target's side is protected by Crafty Shield, Mat Block, Quick Guard, or Wide Guard, that protection is also broken for this turn and other Pokemon may attack the target's side normally. This attack charges on the first turn and executes on the second. On the first turn, the user avoids all attacks. If the user is holding a Power Herb, the move completes in one turn.

moves.name: Pin Missile
moves.desc: Hits 2-5 times in one turn.
moves.longDesc: Hits two to five times. Has a 35% chance to hit two or three times and a 15% chance to hit four or five times. If one of the hits breaks the target's substitute, it will take damage for the remaining hits. If the user has the Skill Link Ability, this move will always hit five times. If the user is holding Loaded Dice, this move will hit 4-5 times.

moves.name: Play Rough
moves.desc: 10% chance to lower the target's Attack by 1.
moves.longDesc: Has a 10% chance to lower the target's Attack by 1 stage.

moves.name: Pluck
moves.desc: User steals and eats the target's Berry.
moves.longDesc: If this move is successful and the user has not fainted, it steals the target's held Berry if it is holding one and eats it immediately, gaining its effects even if the user's item is being ignored. Items lost to this move cannot be regained with Recycle or the Harvest Ability.

moves.name: Poison Fang
moves.desc: 50% chance to badly poison the target.
moves.longDesc: Has a 50% chance to badly poison the target.

moves.name: Poison Jab
moves.desc: 30% chance to poison the target.
moves.longDesc: Has a 30% chance to poison the target.

moves.name: Poison Powder
moves.desc: Poisons the target.
moves.longDesc: Poisons the target.

moves.name: Pollen Puff
moves.desc: If the target is an ally, heals 50% of its max HP.
moves.longDesc: If the target is an ally, this move restores 1/2 of its maximum HP, rounded down, instead of dealing damage.

moves.name: Poltergeist
moves.desc: Fails if the target has no held item.
moves.longDesc: Fails if the target has no held item.

moves.name: Population Bomb
moves.desc: Hits 10 times. Each hit can miss.
moves.longDesc: Hits ten times. This move checks accuracy for each hit, and the attack ends if the target avoids a hit. If one of the hits breaks the target's substitute, it will take damage for the remaining hits. If the user has the Skill Link Ability, this move will always hit ten times. If the user is holding Loaded Dice, this move hits four to ten times at random without checking accuracy between hits.

moves.name: Pounce
moves.desc: 100% chance to lower the target's Speed by 1.
moves.longDesc: Has a 100% chance to lower the target's Speed by 1 stage.

moves.name: Power Gem
moves.desc: No additional effect.
moves.longDesc: No additional effect.

moves.name: Power Split
moves.desc: Averages Attack and Sp. Atk stats with target.
moves.longDesc: The user and the target have their Attack and Special Attack stats set to be equal to the average of the user and the target's Attack and Special Attack stats, respectively, rounded down. Stat stage changes are unaffected.

moves.name: Power Swap
moves.desc: Swaps Attack and Sp. Atk stat stages with target.
moves.longDesc: The user swaps its Attack and Special Attack stat stage changes with the target.

moves.name: Power Trick
moves.desc: Switches user's Attack and Defense stats.
moves.longDesc: The user swaps its Attack and Defense stats, and stat stage changes remain on their respective stats. This move can be used again to swap the stats back. If the user uses Baton Pass, the replacement will have its Attack and Defense stats swapped if the effect is active. If the user has its stats recalculated by changing forme while its stats are swapped, this effect is ignored but is still active for the purposes of Baton Pass.

moves.name: Power Trip
moves.desc: + 20 power for each of the user's stat boosts.
moves.longDesc: Power is equal to 20+(X*20), where X is the user's total stat stage changes that are greater than 0.

moves.name: Power Whip
moves.desc: No additional effect.
moves.longDesc: No additional effect.

moves.name: Protect
moves.desc: Prevents moves from affecting the user this turn.
moves.longDesc: The user is protected from most attacks made by other Pokemon during this turn. This move has a 1/X chance of being successful, where X starts at 1 and triples each time this move is successfully used. X resets to 1 if this move fails, if the user's last move used is not Baneful Bunker, Burning Bulwark, Detect, Endure, King's Shield, Max Guard, Obstruct, Protect, Quick Guard, Silk Trap, Spiky Shield, or Wide Guard, or if it was one of those moves and the user's protection was broken. Fails if the user moves last this turn.

moves.name: Psych Up
moves.desc: Copies the target's current stat stages.
moves.longDesc: The user copies all of the target's current stat stage changes.

moves.name: Psychic
moves.desc: 10% chance to lower the target's Sp. Def by 1.
moves.longDesc: Has a 10% chance to lower the target's Special Defense by 1 stage.

moves.name: Psychic Fangs
moves.desc: Destroys screens, unless the target is immune.
moves.longDesc: If this attack does not miss, the effects of Reflect, Light Screen, and Aurora Veil end for the target's side of the field before damage is calculated.

moves.name: Psychic Noise
moves.desc: For 2 turns, the target is prevented from healing.
moves.longDesc: For 2 turns, the target is prevented from restoring any HP as long as it remains active. During the effect, healing and draining moves are unusable, and Abilities and items that grant healing will not heal the user. If an affected Pokemon uses Baton Pass, the replacement will remain unable to restore its HP. Pain Split and the Regenerator Ability are unaffected.

moves.name: Psychic Terrain
moves.desc: 5 turns. Grounded: +Psychic power, priority-safe.
moves.longDesc: For 5 turns, the terrain becomes Psychic Terrain. During the effect, the power of Psychic-type attacks made by grounded Pokemon is multiplied by 1.3 and grounded Pokemon cannot be hit by moves with priority greater than 0, unless the target is an ally. Camouflage transforms the user into a Psychic type, Nature Power becomes Psychic, and Secret Power has a 30% chance to lower the target's Speed by 1 stage. Fails if the current terrain is Psychic Terrain.

moves.name: Psycho Cut
moves.desc: High critical hit ratio.
moves.longDesc: Has a higher chance for a critical hit.

moves.name: Psyshield Bash
moves.desc: 100% chance to raise the user's Defense by 1.
moves.longDesc: Has a 100% chance to raise the user's Defense by 1 stage.

moves.name: Psyshock
moves.desc: Damages target based on Defense, not Sp. Def.
moves.longDesc: Deals damage to the target based on its Defense instead of Special Defense.

moves.name: Quash
moves.desc: Forces the target to move last this turn.
moves.longDesc: Causes the target to take its turn after all other Pokemon this turn, no matter the priority of its selected move. Fails if the target already moved this turn.

moves.name: Quick Attack
moves.desc: Usually goes first.
moves.longDesc: No additional effect.

moves.name: Quick Guard
moves.desc: Protects allies from priority attacks this turn.
moves.longDesc: The user and its party members are protected from attacks with original or altered priority greater than 0 made by other Pokemon, including allies, during this turn. This move modifies the same 1/X chance of being successful used by other protection moves, where X starts at 1 and triples each time this move is successfully used, but does not use the chance to check for failure. X resets to 1 if this move fails, if the user's last move used is not Baneful Bunker, Burning Bulwark, Detect, Endure, King's Shield, Max Guard, Obstruct, Protect, Quick Guard, Silk Trap, Spiky Shield, or Wide Guard, or if it was one of those moves and the user's protection was broken. Fails if the user moves last this turn or if this move is already in effect for the user's side.

moves.name: Quiver Dance
moves.desc: Raises the user's Sp. Atk, Sp. Def, Speed by 1.
moves.longDesc: Raises the user's Special Attack, Special Defense, and Speed by 1 stage.

moves.name: Rage Fist
moves.desc: +50 power for each time user was hit. Max 6 hits.
moves.longDesc: Power is equal to 50+(X*50), where X is the total number of times the user has been hit by a damaging attack during the battle, even if the user did not lose HP from the attack. X cannot be greater than 6 and does not reset upon switching out or fainting. Each hit of a multi-hit attack is counted, but confusion damage is not counted.

moves.name: Rage Powder
moves.desc: The foes' moves target the user on the turn used.
moves.longDesc: Until the end of the turn, all single-target attacks from the opposing side are redirected to the user. Such attacks are redirected to the user before they can be reflected by Magic Coat or the Magic Bounce Ability, or drawn in by the Lightning Rod or Storm Drain Abilities. Fails if it is not a Double Battle or Battle Royal. This effect is ignored while the user is under the effect of Sky Drop.

moves.name: Raging Bull
moves.desc: Destroys screens. Type depends on user's form.
moves.longDesc: If this attack does not miss, the effects of Reflect, Light Screen, and Aurora Veil end for the target's side of the field before damage is calculated. If the user's current form is a Paldean Tauros, this move's type changes to match. Fighting type for Combat Breed, Fire type for Blaze Breed, and Water type for Aqua Breed.

moves.name: Raging Fury
moves.desc: Lasts 2-3 turns. Confuses the user afterwards.
moves.longDesc: The user spends two or three turns locked into this move and becomes confused immediately after its move on the last turn of the effect if it is not already. This move targets an opposing Pokemon at random on each turn. If the user is prevented from moving, is asleep at the beginning of a turn, or the attack is not successful against the target on the first turn of the effect or the second turn of a three-turn effect, the effect ends without causing confusion. If this move is called by Sleep Talk and the user is asleep, the move is used for one turn and does not confuse the user.

moves.name: Rain Dance
moves.desc: For 5 turns, heavy rain powers Water moves.
moves.longDesc: For 5 turns, the weather becomes Rain Dance. The damage of Water-type attacks is multiplied by 1.5 and the damage of Fire-type attacks is multiplied by 0.5 during the effect. Lasts for 8 turns if the user is holding Damp Rock. Fails if the current weather is Rain Dance.

moves.name: Rapid Spin
moves.desc: Free user from hazards/bind/Leech Seed; +1 Spe.
moves.longDesc: If this move is successful and the user has not fainted, the effects of Leech Seed and binding moves end for the user, and all hazards are removed from the user's side of the field. Has a 100% chance to raise the user's Speed by 1 stage.

moves.name: Razor Shell
moves.desc: 50% chance to lower the target's Defense by 1.
moves.longDesc: Has a 50% chance to lower the target's Defense by 1 stage.

moves.name: Recover
moves.desc: Heals the user by 50% of its max HP.
moves.longDesc: The user restores 1/2 of its maximum HP, rounded half up.

moves.name: Recycle
moves.desc: Restores the item the user last used.
moves.longDesc: The user regains the item it last used. Fails if the user is holding an item, if the user has not held an item, if the item was a popped Air Balloon, if the item was picked up by a Pokemon with the Pickup Ability, or if the item was lost to Bug Bite, Corrosive Gas, Covet, Incinerate, Knock Off, Pluck, or Thief. Items thrown with Fling can be regained.

moves.name: Reflect
moves.desc: For 5 turns, physical damage to allies is halved.
moves.longDesc: For 5 turns, the user and its party members take 0.5x damage from physical attacks, or 0.66x damage if in a Double Battle. Damage is not reduced further with Aurora Veil. Critical hits ignore this effect. It is removed from the user's side if the user or an ally is successfully hit by Brick Break, Psychic Fangs, or Defog. Lasts for 8 turns if the user is holding Light Clay. Fails if the effect is already active on the user's side.

moves.name: Reflect Type
moves.desc: User becomes the same type as the target.
moves.longDesc: Causes the user's types to become the same as the current types of the target. If the target's current types include typeless and a non-added type, typeless is ignored. If the target's current types include typeless and an added type from Forest's Curse or Trick-or-Treat, typeless is copied as the Normal type instead. Fails if the user is an Arceus or a Silvally, if the user is Terastallized, or if the target's current type is typeless alone.

moves.name: Rest
moves.desc: User sleeps 2 turns and restores HP and status.
moves.longDesc: The user falls asleep for the next two turns and restores all of its HP, curing itself of any non-volatile status condition in the process. Fails if the user has full HP, is already asleep, or if another effect is preventing sleep.

moves.name: Reversal
moves.desc: More power the less HP the user has left.
moves.longDesc: The power of this move is 20 if X is 33 to 48, 40 if X is 17 to 32, 80 if X is 10 to 16, 100 if X is 5 to 9, 150 if X is 2 to 4, and 200 if X is 0 or 1, where X is equal to (user's current HP * 48 / user's maximum HP), rounded down.

moves.name: Rising Voltage
moves.desc: 2x power if target is grounded in Electric Terrain.
moves.longDesc: If the current terrain is Electric Terrain and the target is grounded, this move's power is doubled.

moves.name: Roar
moves.desc: Forces the target to switch to a random ally.
moves.longDesc: The target is forced to switch out and be replaced with a random unfainted ally. Fails if the target is the last unfainted Pokemon in its party, or if the target used Ingrain previously or has the Suction Cups Ability.

moves.name: Rock Blast
moves.desc: Hits 2-5 times in one turn.
moves.longDesc: Hits two to five times. Has a 35% chance to hit two or three times and a 15% chance to hit four or five times. If one of the hits breaks the target's substitute, it will take damage for the remaining hits. If the user has the Skill Link Ability, this move will always hit five times. If the user is holding Loaded Dice, this move will hit 4-5 times.

moves.name: Rock Polish
moves.desc: Raises the user's Speed by 2.
moves.longDesc: Raises the user's Speed by 2 stages.

moves.name: Rock Slide
moves.desc: 30% chance to make the foe(s) flinch.
moves.longDesc: Has a 30% chance to make the target flinch.

moves.name: Rock Tomb
moves.desc: 100% chance to lower the target's Speed by 1.
moves.longDesc: Has a 100% chance to lower the target's Speed by 1 stage.

moves.name: Rock Wrecker
moves.desc: User cannot move next turn.
moves.longDesc: If this move is successful, the user must recharge on the following turn and cannot select a move.

moves.name: Role Play
moves.desc: User replaces its Ability with the target's.
moves.longDesc: The user's Ability changes to match the target's Ability. Fails if the user's Ability is As One, Battle Bond, Comatose, Disguise, Gulp Missile, Ice Face, Multitype, Power Construct, RKS System, Schooling, Shields Down, Stance Change, Tera Shift, Zen Mode, Zero to Hero, or already matches the target, or if the target's Ability is As One, Battle Bond, Comatose, Commander, Disguise, Embody Aspect, Flower Gift, Forecast, Hunger Switch, Ice Face, Illusion, Imposter, Multitype, Neutralizing Gas, Poison Puppeteer, Power Construct, Power of Alchemy, Protosynthesis, Quark Drive, Receiver, RKS System, Schooling, Shields Down, Stance Change, Tera Shell, Tera Shift, Teraform Zero, Trace, Wonder Guard, Zen Mode, or Zero to Hero.

moves.name: Roost
moves.desc: Heals 50% HP. Flying-type removed 'til turn ends.
moves.longDesc: The user restores 1/2 of its maximum HP, rounded half up. If the user is not Terastallized, until the end of the turn Flying-type users lose their Flying type and pure Flying-type users become Normal type. Does nothing if the user's HP is full.

moves.name: Round
moves.desc: Power doubles if others used Round this turn.
moves.longDesc: If there are other active Pokemon that chose this move for use this turn, those Pokemon take their turn immediately after the user, in Speed order, and this move's power is 120 for each other user.

moves.name: Sacred Sword
moves.desc: Ignores the target's stat stage changes.
moves.longDesc: Ignores the target's stat stage changes, including evasiveness.

moves.name: Safeguard
moves.desc: For 5 turns, protects user's party from status.
moves.longDesc: For 5 turns, the user and its party members cannot have non-volatile status conditions or confusion inflicted on them by other Pokemon. Pokemon on the user's side cannot become affected by Yawn but can fall asleep from its effect. It is removed from the user's side if the user or an ally is successfully hit by Defog. Fails if the effect is already active on the user's side.

moves.name: Salt Cure
moves.desc: Deals 1/8 max HP each turn; 1/4 on Steel, Water.
moves.longDesc: Causes damage to the target equal to 1/8 of its maximum HP (1/4 if the target is Steel or Water type), rounded down, at the end of each turn during effect. This effect ends when the target is no longer active.

moves.name: Sand Tomb
moves.desc: Traps and damages the target for 4-5 turns.
moves.longDesc: Prevents the target from switching for four or five turns (seven turns if the user is holding Grip Claw). Causes damage to the target equal to 1/8 of its maximum HP (1/6 if the user is holding Binding Band), rounded down, at the end of each turn during effect. The target can still switch out if it is holding Shed Shell or uses Baton Pass, Flip Turn, Parting Shot, Shed Tail, Teleport, U-turn, or Volt Switch. The effect ends if either the user or the target leaves the field, or if the target uses Mortal Spin, Rapid Spin, or Substitute successfully. This effect is not stackable or reset by using this or another binding move.

moves.name: Sandstorm
moves.desc: For 5 turns, a sandstorm rages. Rock: 1.5x SpD.
moves.longDesc: For 5 turns, the weather becomes Sandstorm. At the end of each turn except the last, all active Pokemon lose 1/16 of their maximum HP, rounded down, unless they are a Ground, Rock, or Steel type, or have the Magic Guard, Overcoat, Sand Force, Sand Rush, or Sand Veil Abilities. During the effect, the Special Defense of Rock-type Pokemon is multiplied by 1.5 when taking damage from a special attack. Lasts for 8 turns if the user is holding Smooth Rock. Fails if the current weather is Sandstorm.

moves.name: Scald
moves.desc: 30% chance to burn the target. Thaws target.
moves.longDesc: Has a 30% chance to burn the target. The target thaws out if it is frozen.

moves.name: Scale Shot
moves.desc: Hits 2-5 times. User: -1 Def, +1 Spe after last hit.
moves.longDesc: Hits two to five times. Lowers the user's Defense by 1 stage and raises the user's Speed by 1 stage after the last hit. Has a 35% chance to hit two or three times and a 15% chance to hit four or five times. If one of the hits breaks the target's substitute, it will take damage for the remaining hits. If the user has the Skill Link Ability, this move will always hit five times. If the user is holding Loaded Dice, this move will hit 4-5 times.

moves.name: Scary Face
moves.desc: Lowers the target's Speed by 2.
moves.longDesc: Lowers the target's Speed by 2 stages.

moves.name: Scorching Sands
moves.desc: 30% chance to burn the target. Thaws target.
moves.longDesc: Has a 30% chance to burn the target. The target thaws out if it is frozen.

moves.name: Screech
moves.desc: Lowers the target's Defense by 2.
moves.longDesc: Lowers the target's Defense by 2 stages.

moves.name: Seed Bomb
moves.desc: No additional effect.
moves.longDesc: No additional effect.

moves.name: Seismic Toss
moves.desc: Does damage equal to the user's level.
moves.longDesc: Deals damage to the target equal to the user's level.

moves.name: Self-Destruct
moves.desc: Hits adjacent Pokemon. The user faints.
moves.longDesc: The user faints after using this move, even if this move fails for having no target. This move is prevented from executing if any active Pokemon has the Damp Ability.

moves.name: Shadow Ball
moves.desc: 20% chance to lower the target's Sp. Def by 1.
moves.longDesc: Has a 20% chance to lower the target's Special Defense by 1 stage.

moves.name: Shadow Claw
moves.desc: High critical hit ratio.
moves.longDesc: Has a higher chance for a critical hit.

moves.name: Shadow Punch
moves.desc: This move does not check accuracy.
moves.longDesc: This move does not check accuracy.

moves.name: Shadow Sneak
moves.desc: Usually goes first.
moves.longDesc: No additional effect.

moves.name: Shed Tail
moves.desc: User takes 1/2 its max HP to pass a substitute.
moves.longDesc: The user takes 1/2 of its maximum HP, rounded up, and creates a substitute that has 1/4 of the user's maximum HP, rounded down. The user is replaced with another Pokemon in its party and the selected Pokemon has the substitute transferred to it. Fails if the user would faint, or if there are no unfainted party members.

moves.name: Sheer Cold
moves.desc: OHKOs non-Ice targets. Fails if user's lower level.
moves.longDesc: Deals damage to the target equal to the target's maximum HP. Ignores accuracy and evasiveness modifiers. This attack's accuracy is equal to (user's level - target's level + X)%, where X is 30 if the user is an Ice type and 20 otherwise, and fails if the target is at a higher level. Ice-type Pokemon and Pokemon with the Sturdy Ability are immune.

moves.name: Shell Side Arm
moves.desc: 20% psn. Physical+contact if it would be stronger.
moves.longDesc: Has a 20% chance to poison the target. This move becomes a physical attack that makes contact if the value of ((((2 * the user's level / 5 + 2) * 90 * X) / Y) / 50), where X is the user's Attack stat and Y is the target's Defense stat, is greater than the same value where X is the user's Special Attack stat and Y is the target's Special Defense stat. No stat modifiers other than stat stage changes are considered for this purpose. If the two values are equal, this move chooses a damage category at random.

moves.name: Shell Smash
moves.desc: Lowers Def, SpD by 1; raises Atk, SpA, Spe by 2.
moves.longDesc: Lowers the user's Defense and Special Defense by 1 stage. Raises the user's Attack, Special Attack, and Speed by 2 stages.

moves.name: Shelter
moves.desc: Raises the user's Defense by 2.
moves.longDesc: Raises the user's Defense by 2 stages.

moves.name: Simple Beam
moves.desc: The target's Ability becomes Simple.
moves.longDesc: Causes the target's Ability to become Simple. Fails if the target's Ability is As One, Battle Bond, Comatose, Disguise, Gulp Missile, Ice Face, Multitype, Power Construct, RKS System, Schooling, Shields Down, Simple, Stance Change, Tera Shift, Truant, Zen Mode, or Zero to Hero.

moves.name: Sing
moves.desc: Causes the target to fall asleep.
moves.longDesc: Causes the target to fall asleep.

moves.name: Skill Swap
moves.desc: The user and the target trade Abilities.
moves.longDesc: The user swaps its Ability with the target's Ability. Fails if either the user or the target's Ability is As One, Battle Bond, Comatose, Commander, Disguise, Embody Aspect, Hunger Switch, Ice Face, Illusion, Multitype, Neutralizing Gas, Poison Puppeteer, Power Construct, Protosynthesis, Quark Drive, RKS System, Schooling, Shields Down, Stance Change, Tera Shell, Tera Shift, Teraform Zero, Wonder Guard, Zen Mode, or Zero to Hero.

moves.name: Skitter Smack
moves.desc: 100% chance to lower target's Sp. Atk by 1.
moves.longDesc: Has a 100% chance to lower the target's Special Attack by 1 stage.

moves.name: Sky Attack
moves.desc: Charges, then hits turn 2. 30% flinch. High crit.
moves.longDesc: Has a 30% chance to make the target flinch and a higher chance for a critical hit. This attack charges on the first turn and executes on the second. If the user is holding a Power Herb, the move completes in one turn.

moves.name: Slack Off
moves.desc: Heals the user by 50% of its max HP.
moves.longDesc: The user restores 1/2 of its maximum HP, rounded half up.

moves.name: Sleep Powder
moves.desc: Causes the target to fall asleep.
moves.longDesc: Causes the target to fall asleep.

moves.name: Sleep Talk
moves.desc: User must be asleep. Uses another known move.
moves.longDesc: One of the user's known moves, besides this move, is selected for use at random. Fails if the user is not asleep. The selected move does not have PP deducted from it, and can currently have 0 PP. This move cannot select Assist, Beak Blast, Belch, Bide, Blazing Torque, Celebrate, Chatter, Combat Torque, Copycat, Dynamax Cannon, Focus Punch, Hold Hands, Magical Torque, Me First, Metronome, Mimic, Mirror Move, Nature Power, Noxious Torque, Shell Trap, Sketch, Sleep Talk, Struggle, Uproar, Wicked Torque, or any two-turn move.

moves.name: Sludge Bomb
moves.desc: 30% chance to poison the target.
moves.longDesc: Has a 30% chance to poison the target.

moves.name: Sludge Wave
moves.desc: 10% chance to poison adjacent Pokemon.
moves.longDesc: Has a 10% chance to poison the target.

moves.name: Smack Down
moves.desc: Removes the target's Ground immunity.
moves.longDesc: This move can hit a target using Bounce, Fly, or Sky Drop, or is under the effect of Sky Drop. If this move hits a target under the effect of Bounce, Fly, Magnet Rise, or Telekinesis, the effect ends. If the target is a Flying type that has not used Roost this turn or a Pokemon with the Levitate Ability, it loses its immunity to Ground-type attacks and the Arena Trap Ability as long as it remains active. During the effect, Magnet Rise fails for the target and Telekinesis fails against the target.

moves.name: Smart Strike
moves.desc: This move does not check accuracy.
moves.longDesc: This move does not check accuracy.

moves.name: Snap Trap
moves.desc: Traps and damages the target for 4-5 turns.
moves.longDesc: Prevents the target from switching for four or five turns (seven turns if the user is holding Grip Claw). Causes damage to the target equal to 1/8 of its maximum HP (1/6 if the user is holding Binding Band), rounded down, at the end of each turn during effect. The target can still switch out if it is holding Shed Shell or uses Baton Pass, Flip Turn, Parting Shot, Shed Tail, Teleport, U-turn, or Volt Switch. The effect ends if either the user or the target leaves the field, or if the target uses Mortal Spin, Rapid Spin, or Substitute successfully. This effect is not stackable or reset by using this or another binding move.

moves.name: Snarl
moves.desc: 100% chance to lower the foe(s) Sp. Atk by 1.
moves.longDesc: Has a 100% chance to lower the target's Special Attack by 1 stage.

moves.name: Snore
moves.desc: User must be asleep. 30% chance to flinch target.
moves.longDesc: Has a 30% chance to make the target flinch. Fails if the user is not asleep.

moves.name: Snowscape
moves.desc: For 5 turns, snow falls. Ice: 1.5x Def.
moves.longDesc: For 5 turns, the weather becomes Snow. During the effect, the Defense of Ice-type Pokemon is multiplied by 1.5 when taking damage from a physical attack. Lasts for 8 turns if the user is holding Icy Rock. Fails if the current weather is Snow.

moves.name: Soak
moves.desc: Changes the target's type to Water.
moves.longDesc: Causes the target to become a Water type. Fails if the target is an Arceus or a Silvally, if the target is already purely Water type, or if the target is Terastallized.

moves.name: Solar Beam
moves.desc: Charges turn 1. Hits turn 2. No charge in sunlight.
moves.longDesc: This attack charges on the first turn and executes on the second. Power is halved if the weather is Primordial Sea, Rain Dance, Sandstorm, or Snow and the user is not holding Utility Umbrella. If the user is holding a Power Herb or the weather is Desolate Land or Sunny Day, the move completes in one turn. If the user is holding Utility Umbrella and the weather is Desolate Land or Sunny Day, the move still requires a turn to charge.

moves.name: Solar Blade
moves.desc: Charges turn 1. Hits turn 2. No charge in sunlight.
moves.longDesc: This attack charges on the first turn and executes on the second. Power is halved if the weather is Hail, Primordial Sea, Rain Dance, or Sandstorm and the user is not holding Utility Umbrella. If the user is holding a Power Herb or the weather is Desolate Land or Sunny Day, the move completes in one turn. If the user is holding Utility Umbrella and the weather is Desolate Land or Sunny Day, the move still requires a turn to charge.

moves.name: Sparkling Aria
moves.desc: The target is cured of its burn.
moves.longDesc: If the user has not fainted, the target is cured of its burn.

moves.name: Speed Swap
moves.desc: Swaps Speed stat with target.
moves.longDesc: The user swaps its Speed stat with the target. Stat stage changes are unaffected.

moves.name: Spicy Extract
moves.desc: Raises target's Atk by 2 and lowers its Def by 2.
moves.longDesc: Raises the target's Attack by 2 stages and lowers its Defense by 2 stages.

moves.name: Spikes
moves.desc: Hurts grounded foes on switch-in. Max 3 layers.
moves.longDesc: Sets up a hazard on the opposing side of the field, damaging each opposing Pokemon that switches in, unless it is a Flying-type Pokemon or has the Levitate Ability. Can be used up to three times before failing. Opponents lose 1/8 of their maximum HP with one layer, 1/6 of their maximum HP with two layers, and 1/4 of their maximum HP with three layers, all rounded down. Can be removed from the opposing side if any Pokemon uses Tidy Up, or if any opposing Pokemon uses Mortal Spin, Rapid Spin, or Defog successfully, or is hit by Defog.

moves.name: Spiky Shield
moves.desc: Protects from moves. Contact: loses 1/8 max HP.
moves.longDesc: The user is protected from most attacks made by other Pokemon during this turn, and Pokemon making contact with the user lose 1/8 of their maximum HP, rounded down. This move has a 1/X chance of being successful, where X starts at 1 and triples each time this move is successfully used. X resets to 1 if this move fails, if the user's last move used is not Baneful Bunker, Burning Bulwark, Detect, Endure, King's Shield, Max Guard, Obstruct, Protect, Quick Guard, Silk Trap, Spiky Shield, or Wide Guard, or if it was one of those moves and the user's protection was broken. Fails if the user moves last this turn.

moves.name: Spirit Break
moves.desc: 100% chance to lower the target's Sp. Atk by 1.
moves.longDesc: Has a 100% chance to lower the target's Special Attack by 1 stage.

moves.name: Spirit Shackle
moves.desc: Prevents the target from switching out.
moves.longDesc: Prevents the target from switching out. The target can still switch out if it is holding Shed Shell or uses Baton Pass, Flip Turn, Parting Shot, Teleport, U-turn, or Volt Switch. The effect ends if either the user or the target leaves the field.

moves.name: Spit Up
moves.desc: More power with more uses of Stockpile.
moves.longDesc: Power is equal to 100 times the user's Stockpile count. Fails if the user's Stockpile count is 0. Whether or not this move is successful, the user's Defense and Special Defense decrease by as many stages as Stockpile had increased them, and the user's Stockpile count resets to 0.

moves.name: Spite
moves.desc: Lowers the PP of the target's last move by 4.
moves.longDesc: Causes the target's last move used to lose 4 PP. Fails if the target has not made a move, if the move has 0 PP, or if it no longer knows the move.

moves.name: Stealth Rock
moves.desc: Hurts foes on switch-in. Factors Rock weakness.
moves.longDesc: Sets up a hazard on the opposing side of the field, damaging each opposing Pokemon that switches in. Fails if the effect is already active on the opposing side. Foes lose 1/32, 1/16, 1/8, 1/4, or 1/2 of their maximum HP, rounded down, based on their weakness to the Rock type; 0.25x, 0.5x, neutral, 2x, or 4x, respectively. Can be removed from the opposing side if any Pokemon uses Tidy Up, or if any opposing Pokemon uses Mortal Spin, Rapid Spin, or Defog successfully, or is hit by Defog.

moves.name: Steel Beam
moves.desc: User loses 50% max HP.
moves.longDesc: Whether or not this move is successful and even if it would cause fainting, the user loses 1/2 of its maximum HP, rounded up, unless the user has the Magic Guard Ability.

moves.name: Steel Roller
moves.desc: Fails if there is no terrain active. Ends the terrain.
moves.longDesc: Fails if there is no terrain active. Ends the effects of Electric Terrain, Grassy Terrain, Misty Terrain, and Psychic Terrain.

moves.name: Steel Wing
moves.desc: 10% chance to raise the user's Defense by 1.
moves.longDesc: Has a 10% chance to raise the user's Defense by 1 stage.

moves.name: Sticky Web
moves.desc: Lowers Speed of grounded foes by 1 on switch-in.
moves.longDesc: Sets up a hazard on the opposing side of the field, lowering the Speed by 1 stage of each opposing Pokemon that switches in, unless it is a Flying-type Pokemon or has the Levitate Ability. Fails if the effect is already active on the opposing side. Can be removed from the opposing side if any Pokemon uses Tidy Up, or if any opposing Pokemon uses Mortal Spin, Rapid Spin, or Defog successfully, or is hit by Defog.

moves.name: Stockpile
moves.desc: Raises user's Defense, Sp. Def by 1. Max 3 uses.
moves.longDesc: Raises the user's Defense and Special Defense by 1 stage. The user's Stockpile count increases by 1. Fails if the user's Stockpile count is 3. The user's Stockpile count is reset to 0 when it is no longer active.

moves.name: Stomping Tantrum
moves.desc: Power doubles if the user's last move failed.
moves.longDesc: Power doubles if the user's last move on the previous turn, including moves called by other moves or those used through Instruct, Magic Coat, Snatch, or the Dancer or Magic Bounce Abilities, failed to do any of its normal effects, not including damage from an unsuccessful High Jump Kick, Jump Kick, or Mind Blown, or if the user was prevented from moving by any effect other than recharging or Sky Drop. A move that was blocked by Baneful Bunker, Detect, King's Shield, Protect, Spiky Shield, Crafty Shield, Mat Block, Quick Guard, or Wide Guard will not double this move's power, nor will Bounce or Fly ending early due to the effect of Gravity, Smack Down, or Thousand Arrows.

moves.name: Stone Axe
moves.desc: Sets Stealth Rock on the target's side.
moves.longDesc: If this move is successful, it sets up a hazard on the opposing side of the field, damaging each opposing Pokemon that switches in. Foes lose 1/32, 1/16, 1/8, 1/4, or 1/2 of their maximum HP, rounded down, based on their weakness to the Rock type; 0.25x, 0.5x, neutral, 2x, or 4x, respectively. Can be removed from the opposing side if any Pokemon uses Tidy Up, or if any opposing Pokemon uses Mortal Spin, Rapid Spin, or Defog successfully, or is hit by Defog.

moves.name: Stone Edge
moves.desc: High critical hit ratio.
moves.longDesc: Has a higher chance for a critical hit.

moves.name: Stored Power
moves.desc: + 20 power for each of the user's stat boosts.
moves.longDesc: Power is equal to 20+(X*20), where X is the user's total stat stage changes that are greater than 0.

moves.name: Storm Throw
moves.desc: Always results in a critical hit.
moves.longDesc: This move is always a critical hit unless the target is under the effect of Lucky Chant or has the Battle Armor or Shell Armor Abilities.

moves.name: Strength Sap
moves.desc: User heals HP=target's Atk stat. Lowers Atk by 1.
moves.longDesc: Lowers the target's Attack by 1 stage. The user restores its HP equal to the target's Attack stat calculated with its stat stage before this move was used. If Big Root is held by the user, the HP recovered is 1.3x normal, rounded half down. Fails if the target's Attack stat stage is -6.

moves.name: String Shot
moves.desc: Lowers the foe(s) Speed by 2.
moves.longDesc: Lowers the target's Speed by 2 stages.

moves.name: Struggle Bug
moves.desc: 100% chance to lower the foe(s) Sp. Atk by 1.
moves.longDesc: Has a 100% chance to lower the target's Special Attack by 1 stage.

moves.name: Stuff Cheeks
moves.desc: Must hold Berry to use. User eats Berry, Def +2.
moves.longDesc: This move cannot be selected unless the user is holding a Berry. The user eats its Berry and raises its Defense by 2 stages. This effect is not prevented by the Klutz or Unnerve Abilities, or the effects of Embargo or Magic Room. Fails if the user is not holding a Berry.

moves.name: Stun Spore
moves.desc: Paralyzes the target.
moves.longDesc: Paralyzes the target.

moves.name: Substitute
moves.desc: User takes 1/4 its max HP to put in a substitute.
moves.longDesc: The user takes 1/4 of its maximum HP, rounded down, and puts it into a substitute to take its place in battle. The substitute is removed once enough damage is inflicted on it, if the user switches out or faints, or if any Pokemon uses Tidy Up. Baton Pass can be used to transfer the substitute to an ally, and the substitute will keep its remaining HP. Until the substitute is broken, it receives damage from all attacks made by other Pokemon and shields the user from status effects and stat stage changes caused by other Pokemon. Sound-based moves and Pokemon with the Infiltrator Ability ignore substitutes. The user still takes normal damage from weather and status effects while behind its substitute. If the substitute breaks during a multi-hit attack, the user will take damage from any remaining hits. If a substitute is created while the user is trapped by a binding move, the binding effect ends immediately. Fails if the user does not have enough HP remaining to create a substitute without fainting, or if it already has a substitute.

moves.name: Sucker Punch
moves.desc: Usually goes first. Fails if target is not attacking.
moves.longDesc: Fails if the target did not select a physical attack, special attack, or Me First for use this turn, or if the target moves before the user.

moves.name: Sunny Day
moves.desc: For 5 turns, intense sunlight powers Fire moves.
moves.longDesc: For 5 turns, the weather becomes Sunny Day. The damage of Fire-type attacks is multiplied by 1.5 and the damage of Water-type attacks is multiplied by 0.5 during the effect. Lasts for 8 turns if the user is holding Heat Rock. Fails if the current weather is Sunny Day.

moves.name: Super Fang
moves.desc: Does damage equal to 1/2 target's current HP.
moves.longDesc: Deals damage to the target equal to half of its current HP, rounded down, but not less than 1 HP.

moves.name: Supercell Slam
moves.desc: User is hurt by 50% of its max HP if it misses.
moves.longDesc: If this attack is not successful, the user loses half of its maximum HP, rounded down, as crash damage. Pokemon with the Magic Guard Ability are unaffected by crash damage. Damage doubles and no accuracy check is done if the target has used Minimize while active.

moves.name: Superpower
moves.desc: Lowers the user's Attack and Defense by 1.
moves.longDesc: Lowers the user's Attack and Defense by 1 stage.

moves.name: Surf
moves.desc: Hits adjacent Pokemon. Double damage on Dive.
moves.longDesc: Damage doubles if the target is using Dive.

moves.name: Swagger
moves.desc: Raises the target's Attack by 2 and confuses it.
moves.longDesc: Raises the target's Attack by 2 stages and confuses it.

moves.name: Swallow
moves.desc: Heals the user based on uses of Stockpile.
moves.longDesc: The user restores its HP based on its Stockpile count. Restores 1/4 of its maximum HP if it's 1, 1/2 of its maximum HP if it's 2, both rounded half down, and all of its HP if it's 3. Fails if the user's Stockpile count is 0. The user's Defense and Special Defense decrease by as many stages as Stockpile had increased them, and the user's Stockpile count resets to 0.

moves.name: Sweet Kiss
moves.desc: Causes the target to become confused.
moves.longDesc: Causes the target to become confused.

moves.name: Sweet Scent
moves.desc: Lowers the foe(s) evasiveness by 2.
moves.longDesc: Lowers the target's evasiveness by 2 stages.

moves.name: Switcheroo
moves.desc: User switches its held item with the target's.
moves.longDesc: The user swaps its held item with the target's held item. Fails if both the user and the target have no held item, or if the user is trying to give or take a Blue Orb, Red Orb, Adamant Crystal, Lustrous Globe, Griseous Core, Plate, Drive, Memory, Rusted Sword, Rusted Shield, Booster Energy, or Mask to or from a Kyogre, Groudon, Dialga, Palkia, Giratina, Arceus, Genesect, Silvally, Zacian, Zamazenta, Paradox Pokemon, or Ogerpon, respectively. In this case, Paradox Pokemon include every species with the Protosynthesis and Quark Drive Abilities, except Gouging Fire, Raging Bolt, Iron Boulder, and Iron Crown. The target is immune to this move if it has the Sticky Hold Ability.

moves.name: Swords Dance
moves.desc: Raises the user's Attack by 2.
moves.longDesc: Raises the user's Attack by 2 stages.

moves.name: Synthesis
moves.desc: Heals the user by a weather-dependent amount.
moves.longDesc: The user restores 1/2 of its maximum HP if Delta Stream or no weather conditions are in effect or if the user is holding Utility Umbrella, 2/3 of its maximum HP if the weather is Desolate Land or Sunny Day, and 1/4 of its maximum HP if the weather is Primordial Sea, Rain Dance, Sandstorm, or Snow, all rounded half down.

moves.name: Syrup Bomb
moves.desc: Target's Speed is lowered by 1 stage for 3 turns.
moves.longDesc: If this move is successful, it causes the target's Speed to be lowered by 1 stage at the end of each turn for 3 turns.

moves.name: Tail Slap
moves.desc: Hits 2-5 times in one turn.
moves.longDesc: Hits two to five times. Has a 35% chance to hit two or three times and a 15% chance to hit four or five times. If one of the hits breaks the target's substitute, it will take damage for the remaining hits. If the user has the Skill Link Ability, this move will always hit five times. If the user is holding Loaded Dice, this move will hit 4-5 times.

moves.name: Tailwind
moves.desc: For 4 turns, allies' Speed is doubled.
moves.longDesc: For 4 turns, the user and its party members have their Speed doubled. Fails if this move is already in effect for the user's side.

moves.name: Taunt
moves.desc: Target can't use status moves its next 3 turns.
moves.longDesc: Prevents the target from using non-damaging moves for its next three turns. Pokemon with the Oblivious Ability or protected by the Aroma Veil Ability are immune.

moves.name: Tearful Look
moves.desc: Lowers the target's Attack and Sp. Atk by 1.
moves.longDesc: Lowers the target's Attack and Special Attack by 1 stage.

moves.name: Teatime
moves.desc: All active Pokemon consume held Berries.
moves.longDesc: All active Pokemon consume their held Berries. This effect is not prevented by substitutes, the Klutz or Unnerve Abilities, or the effects of Embargo or Magic Room. Fails if no active Pokemon is holding a Berry.

moves.name: Teeter Dance
moves.desc: Confuses adjacent Pokemon.
moves.longDesc: Causes the target to become confused.

moves.name: Temper Flare
moves.desc: Power doubles if the user's last move failed.
moves.longDesc: Power doubles if the user's last move on the previous turn, including moves called by other moves or those used through Instruct, Magic Coat, Snatch, or the Dancer or Magic Bounce Abilities, failed to do any of its normal effects, not including damage from an unsuccessful High Jump Kick, Jump Kick, or Mind Blown, or if the user was prevented from moving by any effect other than recharging or Sky Drop. A move that was blocked by Baneful Bunker, Detect, King's Shield, Protect, Spiky Shield, Crafty Shield, Mat Block, Quick Guard, or Wide Guard will not double this move's power, nor will Bounce or Fly ending early due to the effect of Gravity, Smack Down, or Thousand Arrows.

moves.name: Terrain Pulse
moves.desc: User on terrain: power doubles, type varies.
moves.longDesc: Power doubles if the user is grounded and a terrain is active, and this move's type changes to match. Electric type during Electric Terrain, Grass type during Grassy Terrain, Fairy type during Misty Terrain, and Psychic type during Psychic Terrain.

moves.name: Thief
moves.desc: If the user has no item, it steals the target's.
moves.longDesc: If this attack was successful and the user has not fainted, it steals the target's held item if the user is not holding one. A target with the Sticky Hold Ability does not lose its held item if it has not fainted. The target's item is not stolen if it is a Blue Orb, Red Orb, Adamant Crystal, Lustrous Globe, Griseous Core, Plate, Drive, Memory, Rusted Sword, Rusted Shield, Booster Energy, or Mask held by a Kyogre, Groudon, Dialga, Palkia, Giratina, Arceus, Genesect, Silvally, Zacian, Zamazenta, Paradox Pokemon, or Ogerpon, respectively, or if the user is one of those species and the target is holding the respective item. In this case, Paradox Pokemon include every species with the Protosynthesis and Quark Drive Abilities, except Gouging Fire, Raging Bolt, Iron Boulder, and Iron Crown. Items lost to this move cannot be regained with Recycle or the Harvest Ability.

moves.name: Thrash
moves.desc: Lasts 2-3 turns. Confuses the user afterwards.
moves.longDesc: The user spends two or three turns locked into this move and becomes confused immediately after its move on the last turn of the effect if it is not already. This move targets an opposing Pokemon at random on each turn. If the user is prevented from moving, is asleep at the beginning of a turn, or the attack is not successful against the target on the first turn of the effect or the second turn of a three-turn effect, the effect ends without causing confusion. If this move is called by Sleep Talk and the user is asleep, the move is used for one turn and does not confuse the user.

moves.name: Throat Chop
moves.desc: For 2 turns, the target cannot use sound moves.
moves.longDesc: For 2 turns, the target cannot use sound-based moves.

moves.name: Thunder
moves.desc: 30% chance to paralyze. Can't miss in rain.
moves.longDesc: Has a 30% chance to paralyze the target. This move can hit a target using Bounce, Fly, or Sky Drop, or is under the effect of Sky Drop. If the weather is Primordial Sea or Rain Dance, this move does not check accuracy. If the weather is Desolate Land or Sunny Day, this move's accuracy is 50%. If this move is used against a Pokemon holding Utility Umbrella, this move's accuracy remains at 70%.

moves.name: Thunder Fang
moves.desc: 10% chance to paralyze. 10% chance to flinch.
moves.longDesc: Has a 10% chance to paralyze the target and a 10% chance to make it flinch.

moves.name: Thunder Punch
moves.desc: 10% chance to paralyze the target.
moves.longDesc: Has a 10% chance to paralyze the target.

moves.name: Thunder Wave
moves.desc: Paralyzes the target.
moves.longDesc: Paralyzes the target. This move does not ignore type immunity.

moves.name: Thunderbolt
moves.desc: 10% chance to paralyze the target.
moves.longDesc: Has a 10% chance to paralyze the target.

moves.name: Tickle
moves.desc: Lowers the target's Attack and Defense by 1.
moves.longDesc: Lowers the target's Attack and Defense by 1 stage.

moves.name: Tidy Up
moves.desc: User +1 Atk, Spe. Clears all substitutes/hazards.
moves.longDesc: Raises the user's Attack and Speed by 1 stage. Removes substitutes from all active Pokemon and ends the effects of Spikes, Stealth Rock, Sticky Web, and Toxic Spikes for both sides.

moves.name: Topsy-Turvy
moves.desc: Inverts the target's stat stages.
moves.longDesc: The target's positive stat stages become negative and vice versa. Fails if all of the target's stat stages are 0.

moves.name: Torch Song
moves.desc: 100% chance to raise the user's Sp. Atk by 1.
moves.longDesc: Has a 100% chance to raise the user's Special Attack by 1 stage.

moves.name: Torment
moves.desc: Target can't select the same move twice in a row.
moves.longDesc: Prevents the target from selecting the same move for use two turns in a row. This effect ends when the target is no longer active.

moves.name: Toxic
moves.desc: Badly poisons the target. Poison types can't miss.
moves.longDesc: Badly poisons the target. If a Poison-type Pokemon uses this move, the target cannot avoid the attack, even if the target is in the middle of a two-turn move.

moves.name: Toxic Spikes
moves.desc: Poisons grounded foes on switch-in. Max 2 layers.
moves.longDesc: Sets up a hazard on the opposing side of the field, poisoning each opposing Pokemon that switches in, unless it is a Flying-type Pokemon or has the Levitate Ability. Can be used up to two times before failing. Opposing Pokemon become poisoned with one layer and badly poisoned with two layers. Can be removed from the opposing side if any Pokemon uses Tidy Up, or if any opposing Pokemon uses Mortal Spin, Rapid Spin, or Defog successfully, is hit by Defog, or a grounded Poison-type Pokemon switches in. Safeguard prevents the opposing party from being poisoned on switch-in, but a substitute does not.

moves.name: Toxic Thread
moves.desc: Lowers the target's Speed by 1 and poisons it.
moves.longDesc: Lowers the target's Speed by 1 stage and poisons it.

moves.name: Trailblaze
moves.desc: 100% chance to raise the user's Speed by 1.
moves.longDesc: Has a 100% chance to raise the user's Speed by 1 stage.

moves.name: Transform
moves.desc: Copies target's stats, moves, types, and Ability.
moves.longDesc: The user transforms into the target. The target's current stats, stat stages, types, moves, Ability, weight, gender, and sprite are copied. The user's level and HP remain the same and each copied move receives only 5 PP, with a maximum of 5 PP each. The user can no longer change formes if it would have the ability to do so. This move fails if it hits a substitute, if either the user or the target is already transformed, or if either is behind an Illusion.

moves.name: Tri Attack
moves.desc: 20% chance to paralyze or burn or freeze target.
moves.longDesc: Has a 20% chance to either burn, freeze, or paralyze the target.

moves.name: Trick
moves.desc: User switches its held item with the target's.
moves.longDesc: The user swaps its held item with the target's held item. Fails if both the user and the target have no held item, or if the user is trying to give or take a Blue Orb, Red Orb, Adamant Crystal, Lustrous Globe, Griseous Core, Plate, Drive, Memory, Rusted Sword, Rusted Shield, Booster Energy, or Mask to or from a Kyogre, Groudon, Dialga, Palkia, Giratina, Arceus, Genesect, Silvally, Zacian, Zamazenta, Paradox Pokemon, or Ogerpon, respectively. In this case, Paradox Pokemon include every species with the Protosynthesis and Quark Drive Abilities, except Gouging Fire, Raging Bolt, Iron Boulder, and Iron Crown. The target is immune to this move if it has the Sticky Hold Ability.

moves.name: Trick Room
moves.desc: Goes last. For 5 turns, turn order is reversed.
moves.longDesc: For 5 turns, the Speed of every Pokemon is recalculated for the purposes of determining turn order. During the effect, each Pokemon's Speed is considered to be (10000 - its normal Speed), and if this value is greater than 8191, 8192 is subtracted from it. If this move is used during the effect, the effect ends.

moves.name: Trick-or-Treat
moves.desc: Adds Ghost to the target's type(s).
moves.longDesc: Causes the Ghost type to be added to the target, effectively making it have two or three types. Fails if the target is already a Ghost type. If Forest's Curse adds a type to the target, it replaces the type added by this move and vice versa.

moves.name: Triple Arrows
moves.desc: High crit. Target: 50% -1 Defense, 30% flinch.
moves.longDesc: Has a 50% chance to lower the target's Defense by 1 stage, a 30% chance to make it flinch, and a higher chance for a critical hit.

moves.name: Triple Axel
moves.desc: Hits 3 times. Each hit can miss, but power rises.
moves.longDesc: Hits three times. Power increases to 40 for the second hit and 60 for the third. This move checks accuracy for each hit, and the attack ends if the target avoids a hit. If one of the hits breaks the target's substitute, it will take damage for the remaining hits. If the user has the Skill Link Ability, this move will always hit three times.

moves.name: Trop Kick
moves.desc: 100% chance to lower the target's Attack by 1.
moves.longDesc: Has a 100% chance to lower the target's Attack by 1 stage.

moves.name: Twin Beam
moves.desc: Hits 2 times in one turn.
moves.longDesc: Hits twice. If the first hit breaks the target's substitute, it will take damage for the second hit.

moves.name: U-turn
moves.desc: User switches out after damaging the target.
moves.longDesc: If this move is successful and the user has not fainted, the user switches out even if it is trapped and is replaced immediately by a selected party member. The user does not switch out if there are no unfainted party members, or if the target switched out using an Eject Button or through the effect of the Emergency Exit or Wimp Out Abilities.

moves.name: Upper Hand
moves.desc: 100% flinch. Fails unless target using priority attack.
moves.longDesc: Has a 100% chance to make the target flinch. Fails if the target did not select a physical or special attack for use this turn with altered priority greater than 0, or if the target moves before the user.

moves.name: Uproar
moves.desc: Lasts 3 turns. Active Pokemon cannot fall asleep.
moves.longDesc: The user spends three turns locked into this move. This move targets an opponent at random on each turn. On the first of the three turns, all sleeping active Pokemon wake up. During the three turns, no active Pokemon can fall asleep by any means, and Pokemon switched in during the effect do not wake up. If the user is prevented from moving or the attack is not successful against the target during one of the turns, the effect ends.

moves.name: Vacuum Wave
moves.desc: Usually goes first.
moves.longDesc: No additional effect.

moves.name: Venoshock
moves.desc: Power doubles if the target is poisoned.
moves.longDesc: Power doubles if the target is poisoned.

moves.name: Volt Switch
moves.desc: User switches out after damaging the target.
moves.longDesc: If this move is successful and the user has not fainted, the user switches out even if it is trapped and is replaced immediately by a selected party member. The user does not switch out if there are no unfainted party members, or if the target switched out using an Eject Button or through the effect of the Emergency Exit or Wimp Out Abilities.

moves.name: Volt Tackle
moves.desc: Has 33% recoil. 10% chance to paralyze target.
moves.longDesc: Has a 10% chance to paralyze the target. If the target lost HP, the user takes recoil damage equal to 33% the HP lost by the target, rounded half up, but not less than 1 HP.

moves.name: Water Pulse
moves.desc: 20% chance to confuse the target.
moves.longDesc: Has a 20% chance to confuse the target.

moves.name: Water Shuriken
moves.desc: Usually goes first. Hits 2-5 times in one turn.
moves.longDesc: Hits two to five times. Has a 35% chance to hit two or three times and a 15% chance to hit four or five times. If one of the hits breaks the target's substitute, it will take damage for the remaining hits. If the user has the Skill Link Ability, this move will always hit five times. If the user is an Ash-Greninja with the Battle Bond Ability, this move has a power of 20 and always hits three times. If the user is holding Loaded Dice, this move will hit 4-5 times.

moves.name: Water Spout
moves.desc: Less power as user's HP decreases. Hits foe(s).
moves.longDesc: Power is equal to (user's current HP * 150 / user's maximum HP), rounded down, but not less than 1.

moves.name: Waterfall
moves.desc: 20% chance to make the target flinch.
moves.longDesc: Has a 20% chance to make the target flinch.

moves.name: Wave Crash
moves.desc: Has 33% recoil.
moves.longDesc: If the target lost HP, the user takes recoil damage equal to 33% the HP lost by the target, rounded half up, but not less than 1 HP.

moves.name: Weather Ball
moves.desc: Power doubles and type varies in each weather.
moves.longDesc: Power doubles if a weather condition other than Delta Stream is active, and this move's type changes to match. Ice type during Snow, Water type during Primordial Sea or Rain Dance, Rock type during Sandstorm, and Fire type during Desolate Land or Sunny Day. If the user is holding Utility Umbrella and uses Weather Ball during Primordial Sea, Rain Dance, Desolate Land, or Sunny Day, this move remains Normal type and does not double in power.

moves.name: Whirlpool
moves.desc: Traps and damages the target for 4-5 turns.
moves.longDesc: Prevents the target from switching for four or five turns (seven turns if the user is holding Grip Claw). Causes damage to the target equal to 1/8 of its maximum HP (1/6 if the user is holding Binding Band), rounded down, at the end of each turn during effect. The target can still switch out if it is holding Shed Shell or uses Baton Pass, Flip Turn, Parting Shot, Shed Tail, Teleport, U-turn, or Volt Switch. The effect ends if either the user or the target leaves the field, or if the target uses Mortal Spin, Rapid Spin, or Substitute successfully. This effect is not stackable or reset by using this or another binding move.

moves.name: Whirlwind
moves.desc: Forces the target to switch to a random ally.
moves.longDesc: The target is forced to switch out and be replaced with a random unfainted ally. Fails if the target is the last unfainted Pokemon in its party, or if the target used Ingrain previously or has the Suction Cups Ability.

moves.name: Wide Guard
moves.desc: Protects allies from multi-target moves this turn.
moves.longDesc: The user and its party members are protected from moves made by other Pokemon, including allies, during this turn that target all adjacent foes or all adjacent Pokemon. This move modifies the same 1/X chance of being successful used by other protection moves, where X starts at 1 and triples each time this move is successfully used, but does not use the chance to check for failure. X resets to 1 if this move fails, if the user's last move used is not Baneful Bunker, Burning Bulwark, Detect, Endure, King's Shield, Max Guard, Obstruct, Protect, Quick Guard, Silk Trap, Spiky Shield, or Wide Guard, or if it was one of those moves and the user's protection was broken. Fails if the user moves last this turn or if this move is already in effect for the user's side.

moves.name: Wild Charge
moves.desc: Has 1/4 recoil.
moves.longDesc: If the target lost HP, the user takes recoil damage equal to 1/4 the HP lost by the target, rounded half up, but not less than 1 HP.

moves.name: Will-O-Wisp
moves.desc: Burns the target.
moves.longDesc: Burns the target.

moves.name: Wish
moves.desc: Next turn, 50% of the user's max HP is restored.
moves.longDesc: At the end of the next turn, the Pokemon at the user's position has 1/2 of the user's maximum HP restored to it, rounded down. Fails if this move is already in effect for the user's position.

moves.name: Wonder Room
moves.desc: For 5 turns, all Defense and Sp. Def stats switch.
moves.longDesc: For 5 turns, all active Pokemon have their Defense and Special Defense stats swapped. Stat stage changes are unaffected. If this move is used during the effect, the effect ends.

moves.name: Wood Hammer
moves.desc: Has 33% recoil.
moves.longDesc: If the target lost HP, the user takes recoil damage equal to 33% the HP lost by the target, rounded half up, but not less than 1 HP.

moves.name: Worry Seed
moves.desc: The target's Ability becomes Insomnia.
moves.longDesc: Causes the target's Ability to become Insomnia. Fails if the target's Ability is As One, Battle Bond, Comatose, Disguise, Gulp Missile, Ice Face, Insomnia, Multitype, Power Construct, RKS System, Schooling, Shields Down, Stance Change, Tera Shift, Truant, Zen Mode, or Zero to Hero.

moves.name: Wrap
moves.desc: Traps and damages the target for 4-5 turns.
moves.longDesc: Prevents the target from switching for four or five turns (seven turns if the user is holding Grip Claw). Causes damage to the target equal to 1/8 of its maximum HP (1/6 if the user is holding Binding Band), rounded down, at the end of each turn during effect. The target can still switch out if it is holding Shed Shell or uses Baton Pass, Flip Turn, Parting Shot, Shed Tail, Teleport, U-turn, or Volt Switch. The effect ends if either the user or the target leaves the field, or if the target uses Mortal Spin, Rapid Spin, or Substitute successfully. This effect is not stackable or reset by using this or another binding move.

moves.name: X-Scissor
moves.desc: No additional effect.
moves.longDesc: No additional effect.

moves.name: Yawn
moves.desc: Puts the target to sleep after 1 turn.
moves.longDesc: Causes the target to fall asleep at the end of the next turn. Fails when used if the target cannot fall asleep or if it already has a non-volatile status condition. At the end of the next turn, if the target is still active, does not have a non-volatile status condition, and can fall asleep, it falls asleep. If the target becomes affected, this effect cannot be prevented by Safeguard or a substitute, or by falling asleep and waking up during the effect.

moves.name: Zap Cannon
moves.desc: 100% chance to paralyze the target.
moves.longDesc: Has a 100% chance to paralyze the target.

moves.name: Zen Headbutt
moves.desc: 20% chance to make the target flinch.
moves.longDesc: Has a 20% chance to make the target flinch.
